title: Not Truly Multilingual: Script Consistency as a Missing Dimension in VLM Evaluation
summary: Current multilingual evaluations for Vision-Language Models (VLMs) assume a one-to-one mapping between language and orthography, overlooking billions of users of multi-script languages. We introduce PuMVR (Punjabi Multimodal Visual Reasoning), a benchmark of 1,000 strictly parallel image-text instances across Punjabi's three active scripts: Gurmukhi, Shahmukhi, and Roman. Evaluating 10 state-of-the-art VLMs, we expose a substantial and systematic Script Gap. Models frequently solve visual tasks in one script while failing identical tasks in another, with accuracy deltas reaching 16%. Crucially, visual input boosts absolute performance uniformly yet does not close the orthographic gap. Furthermore, cross-script in-context transfer is highly brittle, exposing script-locked knowledge representation. Supported by McNemar tests across all script pairs, our findings demonstrate that current "multilingual" VLMs are not truly multi-script. We propose the Script Consistency Rate (SCR), which falls as low as 24.8% on our benchmark, as a mandatory metric for script-agnostic evaluation to ensure equitable AI access. Data and code are available at: https://github.com/prabhjotschugh/Not-Truly-Multilingual-PuMVR.

AI.tldr: PuMVR是一个包含1,000个标准化平行图像-文本实例的Punjabi多模态视觉推理基准，覆盖Gurmukhi、Shahmukhi和Roman三种活跃文字系统。评估10个最先进的视觉语言模型发现，模型在一种文字上能解决视觉任务而在另一种文字上失败，准确率差异高达16%，证明当前"多语言"VLM并非真正的多文字系统。
AI.motivation: 当前多语言视觉语言模型评估默认语言与正字法存在一一映射关系，忽视了使用多种文字系统的数十亿用户。研究旨在揭示VLM在多文字语言（以旁遮普语为例）上的系统性性能差异，填补多文字评估基准缺失的空白。
AI.method: 构建PuMVR基准，包含1,000个严格并行的跨三种文字（Gurmukhi、Shahmukhi、Roman）图像-文本实例。评估10个最先进VLM，采用McNemar检验进行所有文字对的统计显著性分析，并提出Script Consistency Rate (SCR)作为文字无关评估的强制性指标。
AI.result: 模型在一种文字上解决视觉任务而在同任务另一种文字上失败，准确率差异达16%；视觉输入虽能均匀提升绝对性能但无法弥合正字法差距；跨文字上下文内迁移高度脆弱，暴露了文字锁定的知识表征；SCR最低仅24.8%，McNemar检验证实所有文字对间差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 当前多语言VLM并非真正的多文字系统，存在系统性的文字差距。研究提出将SCR作为强制评估指标以确保AI的公平可及性，并呼吁关注多文字语言在VLM评估中的代表性。

title: GeoDisaster: Benchmarking Orchestrated Agents for Operational Disaster Geo-Intelligence
summary: Remote-sensing vision-language models (RS-VLMs) have advanced Earth-observation analysis toward visual interpretation and instruction-following, yet fall short of operational geo-intelligence, which demands tool-grounded spatial reasoning and structured, evidence-backed decisions. We introduce GeoDisaster, an operational geospatial disaster reasoning benchmark with 2,921 verified instances across 43 question types and five task families: deforestation monitoring, multi-hazard analysis, building-damage assessment, flood-safe routing, and Sentinel-1 SAR flood monitoring. Instances integrate heterogeneous EO/GIS evidence-optical and SAR imagery, raster masks, vector geometries, road networks, and exposure layers-spanning hazard detection, damage assessment, exposure estimation, and diagnostic report generation. Ground-truth answers are grounded in executable geospatial workflows and deterministic consistency checks, removing the need for language-model annotation. We further propose an orchestrated multi-agent framework with 18 disaster-oriented tools, where role-specialized agents coordinate through explicit execution contracts, aligned via Role-Contract Expectation Alignment (RCEA): failure-aware supervised fine-tuning combined with contract-grounded reinforcement learning over dense step-level signals. Experiments show that GeoDisaster challenges existing RS-VLMs and agentic systems, while RCEA improves tool use, evidence grounding, state consistency, and decision generation.

AI.tldr: GeoDisaster是一个面向地球观测灾害推理的基准数据集与多智能体框架，包含2,921个实例、43种问题类型和18个面向灾害的工具，通过角色合约期望对齐（RCEA）方法结合监督微调与合约引导强化学习，显著提升了遥感视觉语言模型在结构化空间推理、工具调用和证据锚定方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感视觉语言模型（RS-VLMs）虽在视觉解释与指令跟随上取得进展，但缺乏面向操作化地理空间智能的能力，无法完成基于工具的结构化空间推理和证据支持的决策，尤其是在灾害响应等关键场景中需要异构EO/GIS证据的整合与确定性验证。
AI.method: 论文提出GeoDisaster基准（2,921个实例、43种问题类型、5大任务族）和一种编排式多智能体框架，包含18个面向灾害的工具；角色专化智能体通过显式执行合约协调，并引入角色合约期望对齐（RCEA）方法，结合失败感知的监督微调与基于合约的强化学习（利用密集的步骤级信号）进行对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，GeoDisaster对现有RS-VLMs和智能体系统构成显著挑战；RCEA方法有效提升了工具使用能力、证据锚定、状态一致性和决策生成质量，证明了合约引导的强化学习在结构化地理空间推理任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GeoDisaster揭示了当前RS-VLMs在操作化地理空间推理上的根本局限，并验证了通过角色合约对齐机制将工具化推理与结构化决策相结合的有效路径，为构建可部署的地球观测智能系统提供了基准与方法支撑。

title: Reasoning Text-to-Video Retrieval for Operating Room Clips via Action-Driven Digital Twins
summary: Text-to-video retrieval in operating rooms (OR) is an enabling technology for OR safety, as it allows stakeholders to retrieve and inspect recordings of specific events. However, because the most safety-critical events may not follow the common structure, to unlock its full potential text-to-video retrieval must be able to handle implicit queries that require reasoning to identify the right video (e.g., the step right before clipping). However, existing methods rely on global embeddings that cannot reason over such queries. We propose OR3, a text-to-video retrieval method that converts clips into action-driven digital twins (ActDTs), grouping concurrent subject-action-object triplets under non-overlapping temporal intervals. Moreover, rather than cross-modal matching through paired encoders, OR3 performs imagination-based retrieval where an LLM generates hypothetical ActDTs from queries. This enables intra-modal matching via a single encoder trained with ActDT-tailored hard negatives. Finally, evidence-grounded refinement revises imagined ActDTs based on discrepancies with top candidates to capture procedure-specific patterns. We construct a benchmark from MM-OR with 276 implicit queries across four reasoning categories over 386 clips from robotic knee procedures. OR3 achieves 57.6 R@1 and 77.3 R@5, outperforming the strongest baseline. These results demonstrate that OR3 enables fine-grained discrimination between visually similar OR video clips through temporal action reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出OR3，一种基于动作驱动数字孪生（ActDT）和LLM想象推理的文本-视频检索方法，在手术室隐式查询场景下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-视频检索方法依赖全局嵌入，无法处理需要推理才能匹配的隐式查询（如"剪断前一步"），而手术室中最关键的安全事件往往不符合常规结构，因此亟需一种能够对视频片段进行细粒度时空动作推理的检索方法。
AI.method: OR3将视频片段转换为动作驱动数字孪生（ActDT），将并行的主谓-宾三元组按非重叠时间间隔分组；利用LLM从查询中生成假设ActDT实现想象式检索，从而将跨模态匹配转化为基于单编码器的模态内匹配；并引入证据驱动的精炼机制，基于与top候选的差异修正假设ActDT以捕捉术式特有模式。
AI.result: 在来自MM-OR的386个膝关节镜手术视频片段及276条跨四类推理的隐式查询上，OR3达到57.6 R@1和77.3 R@5，显著超过最强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: OR3通过将视频检索转化为基于ActDT的模态内推理匹配，实现了对视觉相似手术视频片段的细粒度区分，证明了基于LLM想象生成的数字孪生表示在隐式查询检索任务中的有效性。

title: FATE: Pillar Encoding and Frequency-Aware Training for Event-Based Object Detection
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that asynchronously capture logarithmic intensity changes, offering inherent advantages in high-speed and high-dynamic-range scenarios. However, the sparse and asynchronous nature of event streams poses a fundamental challenge for modern deep learning architectures. To enable compatibility with standard models, most existing approaches partition the accumulation window into fixed temporal sub-bins. While effective for spatial processing, this internal discretization discards fine-grained temporal structure and constrains inference to the low temporal frequencies imposed by training supervision. To address this limitation, we propose FATE, a unified framework built upon a novel Pillar Encoding (PE). While operating over discrete macro-accumulation windows dictated by the target frequency, PE avoids internal temporal sub-binning. It organizes events into spatial pillars and approximates their intra-window evolution via projection onto a continuous-time orthogonal polynomial basis. This formulation yields an L2-optimal representation that retains rich temporal dynamics in a dense pseudo-image, mitigating information loss under sparse event conditions. To fully leverage this representation, we introduce Frequency-Aware Training (FAT), a soft mean-teacher curriculum that generates temporally dense pseudo-labels, effectively bridging the mismatch between low-frequency supervision and high-frequency inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FATE generalizes across architectural paradigms and consistently outperforms strong baselines. It enables robust object detection at high temporal resolutions up to 200 Hz, while incurring minimal overhead in parameter count and inference latency

AI.tldr: FATE提出了一种基于柱状编码（Pillar Encoding）的统一框架，通过连续时间正交多项式基近似事件流内部演化，并结合频率感知训练（FAT）课程学习策略，解决了事件相机传统子时间仓离散化导致的时间结构丢失问题，在高达200Hz的时间分辨率下实现鲁棒目标检测，且参数量和推理延时开销极小。
AI.motivation: 事件相机的异步稀疏事件流难以直接适配现代深度学习架构，现有方法通过固定时间子仓将事件流离散化为伪图像，虽保留了空间信息但丢弃了细粒度时间结构，且模型推理受限于训练监督的低时间频率，无法在高帧率场景下充分利用事件数据的时间分辨率优势。
AI.method: FATE框架包含两大核心组件：柱状编码（Pillar Encoding, PE）将事件组织到空间柱内，通过投影到连续时间正交多项式基上逼近柱内事件的时域演化，从而得到保留丰富时间动态的密集伪图像表示；频率感知训练（Frequency-Aware Training, FAT）采用软均值教师课程学习策略，生成时间上密集的伪标签，弥合低频监督与高频推理之间的频率不匹配。
AI.result: FATE架构在多种网络结构范式下均一致优于强基线方法，在高达200Hz的时间分辨率下实现了鲁棒的目标检测性能，同时参数量增长和推理延时增加极小，有效缓解了稀疏事件条件下的信息丢失问题。
AI.conclusion: FATE通过连续时间多项式基表示和频率感知训练，在不引入额外时间子仓离散化的前提下同时保留了事件的精细时间结构与高频推理能力，为事件相机与标准深度学习模型的兼容提供了一种统一的、低开销的解决方案，拓展了事件相机在高时间分辨率实时感知任务中的适用性。

title: RepSelect: Robust LLM Unlearning via Representation Selectivity
summary: Making large language models (LLMs) deeply forget specific knowledge and values without sacrificing general capabilities remains a central challenge in unlearning. However, current methods are easily reversed by fine-tuning or few-shot prompting, suggesting their forgetting is only shallow. We identify the root cause. Existing methods target representations shared with both the retain set and the subspace recovered by a fine-tuning attacker, making unlearning both disruptive to general capabilities and easy to reverse. We propose RepSelect (Representation Selectivity), isolates forget-set-specific representations by collapsing top principal components of weight gradients before each update, leaving general capabilities intact while limiting what fine-tuning can recover. We evaluate across two forget categories, biohazardous knowledge and abusive tendencies, and four model families spanning dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures (Llama 3, Qwen 3.5, Gemma 4 E4B, DeepSeek V2 Lite). Compared to five popular baselines (GradDiff, NPO, SimNPO, RMU, UNDIAL), RepSelect achieves a 4-50x larger reduction in post-relearning answer accuracy than the strongest baseline, and is near-perfectly robust to few-shot prompting attacks. Targeting selective representations is thus an important step towards deep and robust LLM forgetting.

AI.tldr: 提出RepSelect方法，通过在线更新前折叠权值梯度的主成分来隔离遗忘集特定表示，实现了比现有方法4-50倍更好的抗再学习鲁棒性，且对少样本提示攻击近乎完全鲁棒，标志着向深度、鲁棒的LLM遗忘迈出重要一步。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法很容易被微调或少样本提示逆向恢复，说明遗忘仅是浅层的；其根本原因在于现有方法针对与保留集以及微调攻击者能恢复的子空间共享的表示进行抑制，既破坏通用能力又容易逆转。
AI.method: RepSelect的核心是在每次权重更新前，折叠当前梯度矩阵的前若干主成分（top principal components），从而隔离出仅与遗忘集相关的表示，同时保留与保留集和攻击者可恢复子空间无关的部分，以维持通用能力并限制微调可恢复的信息量。
AI.result: 在两个遗忘类别（生物危害知识、滥用倾向）和四个模型家族（Llama 3、Qwen 3.5、Gemma 4 E4B、DeepSeek V2 Lite，包含密集和MoE架构）上，与GradDiff、NPO、SimNPO、RMU、UNDIAL五种基线相比，RepSelect在再学习后答案准确率降低上比最强基线高出4-50倍，并且对少样本提示攻击近乎完全鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 通过精确作用于遗忘集特定表示而非共享表示，可以在不牺牲通用能力的前提下实现深层且鲁棒的LLM遗忘，为设计更安全的模型遗忘机制提供了重要方向。

title: SkillChain-Gym: A Benchmark for Reskilling-Aware Production-Inventory Control under Disruptions
summary: Production planning increasingly has to treat workforce capability as a decision variable: certifications lapse when skills are not maintained, new products require skills the current workforce does not hold, and reskilling competes for the same worker hours needed for production. Existing operations benchmarks usually treat labor as exogenous, while workforce-planning models with skills and learning are rarely released as reusable testbeds. We introduce SkillChain-Gym, a benchmark specification for reskilling-aware production-inventory control: a single-site environment with stylized worker skill-state dynamics, hard threshold certification, forgetting, and capacity-consuming training actions constrained by the same per-worker time budget as production. The benchmark includes seed-controlled disruption scenarios, three feasibility modes with projection diagnostics, deterministic replay, and metrics covering operations, resilience, capability growth, and training-access distribution. We evaluate production-only, reactive adaptive, water-filling adaptive, and static-insurance policies with budget variants over 60-shift horizons with paired statistical tests. The results are regime-dependent rather than a ranking. Training-capable policies dominate the production-only baseline, and maintenance training is necessary under forgetting even without disruptions. Among training-capable classes, adaptive training helps when bottlenecks are visible in the forecast, while a lean static cross-training plan, a deliberately favorable comparator whose structure encodes relevant skill contingencies, acts as strong insurance under surprise shocks and absenteeism. Capacity slack and the forgetting rate govern the boundary between these regimes. No policy class dominates across regimes, motivating forecast-driven controllers that decide when to buy skill insurance and when to react.

AI.tldr: SkillChain-Gym 是一个面向重新技能培训感知的生产库存控制基准测试规范，通过引入工人技能状态动态、硬阈值认证、技能遗忘和训练动作约束，揭示了无单一策略在所有场景下占优的机制依赖性结论。
AI.motivation: 现有运营基准通常将劳动力视为外生变量，而具有技能和学习的劳动力规划模型很少以可重复使用的测试平台形式发布，导致面对技能过时、新技能需求以及生产与培训之间资源竞争时缺乏标准化的评估环境。
AI.method: 提出 SkillChain-Gym 基准规范，包含单站点环境、风格化的工人技能状态动态、硬阈值认证、技能遗忘机制、受同一工人时间预算约束的训练动作；提供种子控制的扰动场景、三种可行性模式与投影诊断、确定性重放以及涵盖运营、韧性、能力增长和训练访问分布的度量指标；评估了纯生产、反应式自适应、水填充自适应和静态保险四类策略及其预算变体。
AI.result: 在60个班次的时间范围上进行配对统计检验，结果显示策略表现具有机制依赖性而非统一排名：具备训练能力的策略显著优于纯生产基线，在存在遗忘机制时即使无扰动也需要维持性训练；自适应训练在瓶颈可见于预测时有效，而精细设计的静态交叉训练计划在意外冲击和缺勤场景下提供强保险作用；容量松弛和遗忘率决定了这些机制之间的边界。
AI.conclusion: 无策略类在所有场景下占优，这一结论激励开发能够决定何时购买技能保险（静态交叉训练）和何时做出反应（自适应训练）的预测驱动型控制器。

title: Geometry-Consistent Endoscopic Representations for Image-Guided Navigation via Structured Foundation Model Adaptation
summary: Accurate vision-based navigation in monocular endoscopy is difficult due to limited depth cues, weak tissue texture, non-rigid deformation, and substantial appearance variation across domains, all of which complicate pose estimation, depth prediction, and image-to-anatomy alignment. Although recent vision foundation models have shown promise, their learned representations often remain insufficiently geometry-consistent, hindering stable feature correspondence and limiting their reliability for downstream navigation tasks. We propose a unified framework for learning geometry-consistent and domain-robust image representations for monocular endoscopy. The framework combines a synthetic data pipeline that provides accurate geometric supervision with Hierarchy-Aware Geometry-Semantic Adaptation, a structured alternative to standard LoRA that inserts low-rank adapters selectively across the transformer hierarchy and couples them with layer-wise training objectives to encourage geometric correspondence in intermediate features and semantic consistency in deeper features. Experiments on public and proprietary datasets show improved geometric and semantic representation quality, leading to better performance on downstream navigation tasks including pose estimation and monocular depth estimation. The learned representations show favorable synthetic-to-real transfer on clinical bronchoscopy and provide a useful initialization for adaptation to sinus endoscopy and colonoscopy under limited supervision. The framework also shows favorable scaling with model size and training data. These results support hierarchy-aware, geometry-guided adaptation as a practical approach for endoscopic representation learning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一框架，通过合成数据管道和层级感知几何-语义适配（替代标准LoRA），学习几何一致且域鲁棒的图像表示，显著提升单目内窥镜中的姿态估计与深度预测性能。
AI.motivation: 单目内窥镜导航面临深度线索不足、组织纹理弱、非刚性形变及跨域外观差异大等挑战，现有视觉基础模型学到的表示缺乏几何一致性，难以建立稳定的特征对应关系，限制了在下游导航任务中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出统一框架，包含两个关键组件：一是合成数据管道，提供精确的几何监督信号；二是层级感知几何-语义适配（Hierarchy-Aware Geometry-Semantic Adaptation），作为标准LoRA的结构化替代方案，在Transformer层级中选择性地插入低秩适配器，并辅以逐层训练目标，鼓励中间特征学习几何对应关系、深层特征保持语义一致性。
AI.result: 在公开和专有数据集上，该方法在几何与语义表示质量上均优于基线，提升了姿态估计与单目深度估计等下游导航任务的性能；学到的表示在临床支气管镜上表现出良好的合成到真实迁移能力，并可作为有限监督下适应鼻窦内镜和结肠镜的有效初始化；方法在模型规模和训练数据量上均呈现有利的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 层级感知、几何引导的适配策略是实现内窥镜表示学习的实用方法，能够在缺乏几何监督的真实场景中通过合成预训练与结构化微调获得几何一致的鲁棒表示，为内窥镜视觉导航提供可靠基础。

title: From Parasocial Scripts to Dyadic Persistence in Autonomous AI-Agent Communities
comment: Submitted for review in ARR for EMNLP 2026
summary: While parasocial interactions (PSIs) and parasocial relationships (PSRs) have been studied in conventional media settings, we investigate whether PSI- (colloquial) relational cues also exist in online communities where both sides are autonomous AI agents. We analyze 4,434 posts and 50,338 comments from Moltbook through three theory-based textual indicators: attachment/intimacy language, reciprocity bids, and self-identification to original poster (OP). The combined results across methods based on keyword matching, few-shot large language model (LLM) annotation, and grouped-context LLM annotation reveal that PSI colloquial cues prevail and are strongly associated with OP re-engagement and a reciprocal reply structure. These results are robust across negative controls, nullification, clustered-standard-error re-estimation, and multiple-testing correction. A dyadic persistence test further affirms reciprocity bids aligned with sustained OP-involving mutual recurrence, providing empirical evidence for bridging interaction-level PSI scripts with PSR-consistent repeated dyadic patterns. We interpret the evidence as a behavioral structure in discourse by LLM-enabled agents.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对AI自主智能体社区Moltbook中4,434篇帖子和50,338条评论的分析，发现人际通信中的准社会互动（PSI）口语化线索普遍存在，且与原始发帖人的重新参与和互惠回复结构密切相关，为LLM驱动智能体之间形成类似准社会关系（PSR）的行为模式提供了经验证据。
AI.motivation: 准社会互动（PSI）和准社会关系（PSR）已在传统媒体环境中被广泛研究，但尚未在双方均为自主AI智能体的在线社区中探索PSI口语化关系线索是否存在及其表现形式，本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 本研究基于三个理论文本指标（依恋/亲密语言、互惠性出价、对原始发帖人的自我识别）对Moltbook社区的4,434篇帖子和50,338条评论进行分析，并综合采用关键词匹配、少样本大语言模型（LLM）标注和分组上下文LLM标注三种方法进行文本注释。
AI.result: 研究结果显示，PSI口语化线索在AI智能体社区中普遍存在，且与原始发帖人的重新参与行为和互惠回复结构强烈相关。结果经过阴性对照、无效检验、聚类标准误重估计和多重检验校正后依然稳健。二元持续性检验进一步确认了互惠性出价与持续性互动模式的对齐，验证了PSI脚本与重复的PSR一致性二元模式之间的桥梁。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了实证证据，表明LLM驱动的AI智能体之间能够在话语层面形成类似于人类准社会互动与关系的行为结构，揭示了PSI口语化线索在纯AI社区中的存在及其可测量性，为理解自主智能体之间的社会性交互模式提供了新的视角。

title: Skill-Constrained Model Predictive Control for Resilient Manufacturing Supply Chains
summary: In skill-constrained production-inventory systems, the qualified human capacity available tomorrow depends on training decisions made today: production requires certified workers, certifications decay unless maintained, and training consumes the same scarce worker hours that production needs now. We study a closed-loop skill-constrained model predictive controller that, at every shift, solves a finite-horizon mixed-integer program over production, inventory, backlog, and training, with binary predicted certification, hard production eligibility, and an interpretable terminal value that prices certified-capacity gaps at the horizon boundary; only the first-period action is applied before replanning. On synthetic, seed-controlled SkillChain-Gym scenarios - announced and surprise new-skill shocks, demand shocks, absenteeism, forecast- and availability-quality modes, capacity-boundary and training-rate sweeps, and negative controls - we evaluate the controller against production-only and maintenance-only ablations, static cross-training insurance plans, and a strong reactive heuristic, under an ex-ante locked configuration and paired statistics. The result is regime dependence, not superiority: no policy class dominates. Predictive control helps when skill or labor bottlenecks are forecastable early enough for training to complete; lean static insurance remains hard to beat under surprise shocks, near the demand-capacity boundary, and wherever pre-shock slack makes insurance cheap. Attribution ablations separate certification maintenance, re-acquisition of lapsed certifications, and greenfield skill acquisition. Forecastability, not adaptivity per se, decides when predictive control pays.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了技能约束生产-库存系统中的预测控制策略，提出了一种基于混合整数规划的开环闭环模型预测控制器，并在SkillChain-Gym环境下与多种基线方法对比，发现预测控制仅在技能瓶颈可提前预测时优于静态保险策略，不同策略存在显著的区间依赖性。
AI.motivation: 在技能约束的生产-库存系统中，今天的培训决策直接影响明天可用的合格人力容量：生产需要认证工人，认证会过期，而培训与生产争夺有限的工人工时。现有方法缺乏对这类动态闭环决策问题的系统性比较，特别是预测控制与静态保险策略在不同冲击类型下的优劣尚不明晰。
AI.method: 提出一种闭环技能约束模型预测控制器，每个班次求解一个有限时域混合整数规划，涵盖生产、库存、积压和培训决策，包含二元预测认证状态、硬生产资格约束和可解释的终端价值项（对边界上的认证容量缺口定价），仅应用第一期动作后重新规划。在合成的SkillChain-Gym场景（包括宣布性和突发性新技能冲击、需求冲击、缺勤、预测与可用性质量模式、容量边界与培训率扫描及负控制）中，与仅生产和仅维护消融、静态交叉培训保险计划及强反应式启发式方法进行对比，采用先验锁定的配置和配对统计。
AI.result: 实验结果呈现区间依赖性而非某一策略的绝对优势：当技能或劳动力瓶颈能被足够提前预测以使培训完成时，预测控制有优势；但在突发冲击下、接近需求-容量边界处以及冲击前松弛使保险成本低廉时，静态保险策略难以被击败。归因消融分离了认证维护、过期认证重新获取和新技能获取三种机制的效果。
AI.conclusion: 预测控制并非普遍优于其他策略，其价值取决于冲击的可预测性而非自适应性本身。当技能瓶颈可提前预报时预测控制有效，否则静态保险策略更具竞争力。该研究揭示了技能约束动态系统中不同策略的适用条件，为实际生产中的培训与生产联合优化提供了决策边界指引。

title: DriveJudge: Rethinking Autonomous Driving Evaluation with Vision-Language Models
summary: Autonomous driving has shifted towards end-to-end policy learning, where reliable, interpretable policy evaluation is a fundamental challenge as driving quality is highly context-dependent. Commonly used rule-based driving metrics like EPDMS are interpretable but lack context-awareness, while recent VLMbased evaluations are context-aware but limited by ambiguous VLM outputs and weak physical grounding. To evaluate driving in a manner that is both interpretable and context-aware, we introduce DriveJudge. DriveJudge is a driving evaluation agent that combines rule-grounded evaluation with Vision-Language Model (VLM) reasoning and selectively invokes physically-grounded deterministic rule functions after interpreting the environmental context. To train and evaluate DriveJudge, we curate a large-scale dataset of 33,577 challenging driving samples with human annotations on whether the driving behavior is reasonable in the given scenario. With this dataset, we address the underexplored problem of driving metric evaluation, and introduce two human-aligned benchmark tasks: Driving Quality Classification and Trajectory Preference Selection. DriveJudge outperforms EPDMS for driving quality classification by 21.23 AUC, and the recent VLM-based DriveCritic for trajectory preference selection by 6.5%, setting a new standard for interpretable and precise driving evaluation.

AI.tldr: DriveJudge 是一个结合规则驱动评估与视觉语言模型推理的驾驶评估智能体，通过选择性调用物理基础的确定性规则函数来评估驾驶行为，在驾驶质量分类和轨迹偏好选择两项基准任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶端到端策略评估方法存在根本性权衡：基于规则的驾驶指标（如 EPDMS）具有可解释性但缺乏上下文感知能力，而基于 VLM 的评估方法具有上下文感知能力但受限于 VLM 输出的模糊性和较弱的物理基础，亟需一种同时具备可解释性和上下文感知能力的驾驶评估方法。
AI.method: DriveJudge 是一个驾驶评估智能体，其核心思想是将规则基础评估与视觉语言模型推理相结合，在解释环境上下文后有选择性地调用物理基础的确定性规则函数；同时构建了一个包含 33,577 个具有人类标注的挑战性驾驶样本的大规模数据集，用于训练和评估该模型。
AI.result: DriveJudge 在驾驶质量分类任务上相比 EPDMS 提升了 21.23 AUC，在轨迹偏好选择任务上相比基于 VLM 的 DriveCritic 提升了 6.5%，在两个人类对齐的基准任务上均达到了新的最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将规则基础的可解释性与 VLM 的上下文推理能力有机结合，能够有效弥补单一评估范式的不足，为自动驾驶领域提供了一种同时满足可解释性和精确性的驾驶评估新标准。

title: Revisiting LLM Adaptation for 3D CT Report Generation: A Study of Scaling and Diagnostic Priors
summary: Recent advances in multimodal learning, including large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs), have demonstrated strong adaptability to natural images. However, extending their use to the medical domain, particularly for volumetric (3D) images, is challenging due to high computational complexity, volumetric dependencies and the semantic gap between visual features and clinical terminology. Naively fine-tuning LLMs on limited medical data often leads to overfitting and clinical hallucination, where linguistic fluency is prioritized over clinical factuality. In this study, we investigate parameter-efficient adaptation strategies for volumetric CT report generation and introduce RAD3D-Prefix, a lightweight diagnostic-prior conditioning framework that minimizes the need for extensive parameter training. This module integrates image embeddings with multi-label diagnostic classification logits, preserving critical clinical details while bridging the semantic gap. By keeping the LLM frozen, our method requires minimal trainable parameters and mitigates the risk of overfitting on small, domain-specific datasets. Through a systematic study spanning LLMs from 96.1M to 1.6B parameters, we find that fine-tuning is most beneficial for smaller LLMs, whereas freezing larger (~1B+ LLMs and training only lightweight projection layers provides a superior trade-off between performance, generalization, and computational efficiency. Across multiple automatic metrics and a clinical reader study, RAD3D-Prefix outperforms comparable parameter-efficient baselines and demonstrates strong out-of-domain generalization while using substantially fewer trainable parameters than fully fine-tuned alternatives.

AI.tldr: 提出RAD3D-Prefix，一种轻量级诊断先验条件框架，通过冻结大语言模型并仅训练少量投影层，在三维CT报告生成中实现参数高效适应，同时缓解过拟合和临床幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在医学三维图像（如CT）中的应用面临高计算复杂度、体积依赖性和视觉特征与临床术语之间的语义鸿沟；此外，在有限医学数据上微调LLM容易导致过拟合和临床幻觉，即模型优先保证语言流畅性而非临床事实性。
AI.method: 提出RAD3D-Prefix框架，通过将图像嵌入与多标签诊断分类logits结合作为诊断先验条件，在不更新LLM参数的情况下实现视觉-语言对齐；该方法仅训练轻量级投影层，保持LLM冻结，从而在小型领域数据集上降低过拟合风险。
AI.result: 在涵盖96.1M到1.6B参数的LLM的系统性实验中，发现微调对小型LLM更有效，而对约1B+参数的大型LLM，冻结模型并仅训练轻量投影层可在性能、泛化能力和计算效率之间取得更优平衡；RAD3D-Prefix在多项自动指标和临床读者研究中均优于参数高效的基线方法，并展现出强跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 对于大规模LLM（约1B+参数），冻结主干并仅训练轻量适配层是医学三维报告生成中更优的参数高效策略；RAD3D-Prefix通过诊断先验条件有效弥合语义鸿沟，在减少可训练参数的同时保持了临床事实性和生成质量。

title: MemTrace: Probing What Final Accuracy Misses in Long-Term Memory
summary: LLM agents increasingly maintain long-term memory of user facts across sessions. Yet such memory is usually evaluated by aggregating accuracy over question rows or episodes. Because this approach scores question rows independently, even when several questions probe the same fact, it cannot show how that fact behaves as conditions change. We introduce MemTrace, a benchmark whose unit of measurement is the knowledge point: a single typed fact about the user, rather than an individual question. MemTrace probes each fact along three controlled dimensions: memory age, defined by how many sessions ago the fact appeared in the history; question type, covering current state, earlier state, and trajectory of change; and evidence condition, covering present, missing, and contradicted-by-false-premise settings. Evaluating 13 memory-system configurations across four paradigms, we find that similar pooled accuracy hides different failures: recovering a fact's current and earlier states does not imply tracking how it changed, and safe abstention does not imply correcting a false premise. The dominant bottleneck is evidence use, not retrieval: when systems fail, the evidence was retrievable 10 times more often than it was missing. These results suggest that improving long-term memory requires better use of reachable evidence, not simply more storage or retrieval.

AI.tldr: MemTrace 以知识点（而非单个问题）为评估单元，沿记忆年龄、问题类型和证据条件三个维度对 LLM 长期记忆进行细粒度评测，发现相似的聚合准确率掩盖了不同的失败模式，且系统失败的主因是证据利用不足而非检索缺失。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 长期记忆评测通常按问题行或回合聚合准确率，无法刻画同一事实在不同条件下的行为变化，因而难以揭示记忆系统的真实缺陷。
AI.method: 提出 MemTrace 基准，以知识点（用户单条类型化事实）为基本度量单位，从记忆年龄（事实出现距当前会话的间隔轮数）、问题类型（当前状态、先前状态、变化轨迹）和证据条件（证据存在、缺失、被虚假前提矛盾）三个受控维度对每个事实进行探测，并评估了四种范式下 13 种记忆系统配置。
AI.result: 相似的聚合准确率掩盖了本质不同的失败模式：模型能恢复事实的当前和先前状态并不意味着能追踪其变化过程；安全拒答不等于能纠正虚假前提。系统失败时，证据可检索到的频率比证据缺失高 10 倍以上，表明瓶颈在于证据利用而非检索。
AI.conclusion: 提升 LLM 长期记忆的关键在于更好地利用已经可获取的证据，而非单纯增加存储容量或提升检索能力。

title: Visuals Lie, Consistency Speaks: Disentangling Spatial Attention from Reliability in Vision-Language Models
comment: 16 pages. Accepted to the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Multimodal Intelligence. Code: https://github.com/itsloganmann/VLM-Reliability-Probe
summary: Multimodal Foundation Models are increasingly used as reasoning agents, making reliability, knowing when a model may hallucinate, critical. A common intuition, which we call the Attention-Confidence Assumption, holds that reliability follows from "structural" visual perception: tight attention on relevant regions should signal a trustworthy answer, while scattered attention signals confusion. We challenge this through the VLM Reliability Probe (VRP), a systematic cross-family study of reliability signals in contemporary Vision-Language Models (VLMs). We introduce structural-attention metrics, cluster counts (C_k) and spatial entropy (H_s), to quantify the visual encoder's gaze, and track its evolution (Delta H_s) across layers. This reveals a "Symbolic Detachment": models often "Early Lock" visual features only to diffuse attention later, severing early perception from final generation. Contrary to the grounding hypothesis, we find a "Cluster Failure": spatial attention has near-zero correlation (R approx 0.001) with accuracy. Instead, reliability is a phenomenon of generation dynamics and internal-state distributions. Self-Consistency, the agreement rate across sampled reasoning paths, is the dominant predictor of truth (R = 0.429). Scaling causal interventions exposes a sharp architectural divergence: LLaVA locks its prediction in a fragile late-stage bottleneck, whereas PaliGemma and Qwen2-VL distribute reliability globally, staying resilient even when ~50% or more of their most predictive layer is destroyed. For current VLMs, reliability signals are detached from visual grounding maps and are best inferred from generation-time dynamics and hidden-state probes.

AI.tldr: 该研究质疑了"注意力-置信度假设"，通过系统跨家族分析发现视觉语言模型的可靠性信号与视觉注意力图几乎无关，而主要来源于生成动态和内部状态分布，其中自一致性是准确性的最强预测因子。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态基础模型常被用作推理智能体，其可靠性至关重要。普遍直觉认为模型注意力集中于相关区域时答案可信、注意力分散时表示困惑（即"注意力-置信度假设"），但该假设缺乏系统性验证，研究者旨在检验这一直觉是否真正成立。
AI.method: 研究者提出VLM可靠性探针（VRP），对多种当代视觉语言模型进行跨家族系统分析。引入结构注意力指标——聚类计数（C_k）和空间熵（H_s）——量化视觉编码器的注视模式，并追踪跨层的注意力演化（ΔH_s）。通过自一致性（多个采样推理路径的一致性比率）和因果干预（逐层破坏最预测性层）等方法分析可靠性信号来源。
AI.result: 研究发现"符号脱离"现象：模型早期锁定视觉特征后后期注意力扩散，早期感知与最终生成脱节。空间注意力与准确性的相关性极低（R≈0.001），即"聚类失效"。自一致性是准确性的主导预测因子（R=0.429）。因果干预揭示架构差异：LLaVa将预测锁定在脆弱的后期瓶颈层，而PaliGemma和Qwen2-VL将可靠性分布更全局化，即使破坏50%以上的最预测性层仍保持鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型的可靠性信号与视觉注意力图相脱离，最好的预测来源是生成动态和隐藏状态探针，而非视觉注意力结构。这一发现挑战了基于视觉定位的可靠性假设，为构建更可信的多模态模型提供了新的方向。

title: Implicit vs. Explicit Prompting Strategies for LVLMs in Referential Communication
summary: Two recent studies (Jones et al. (2026); Zeng et al. (2026)) reach apparently contradictory conclusions about whether LVLMs can coordinate on efficient referring expressions. We control for task differences between the studies while directly comparing their prompting styles. We replicate the finding that models can coordinate efficient referring expressions when explicitly prompted to do so, suggesting that other task differences are not responsible for divergent results. However, we also find that the same models fail to infer the need for communicative efficiency from a more implicit prompt, highlighting critical differences between how humans and AI systems communicate.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过控制任务差异并直接比较提示风格，复现了Jones等人(2026)和Zeng等人(2026)关于LVLM能否协调高效指代表达的矛盾结论，发现模型在显式提示下可以协调高效表达，但在隐式提示下无法推断通信效率需求，揭示了人机通信之间的关键差异。
AI.motivation: 两项近期研究(Jones et al., 2026; Zeng et al., 2026)关于大型视觉语言模型能否协调高效指代表达得出了看似矛盾的结论，本研究旨在通过控制任务差异并直接比较提示风格来厘清这一矛盾，并探究模型在显式与隐式通信场景下的行为差异。
AI.method: 通过系统性地控制两项原始研究之间的任务差异，同时直接比较显式提示和隐式提示两种提示风格，在相同条件下复现并对比大型视觉语言模型的协调行为。
AI.result: 成功地复现了模型在显式提示下能够协调高效指代表达的发现，表明其他任务差异并非导致先前结论分歧的原因；然而，相同的模型在面对更隐式的提示时，无法推断出需要通信效率，暴露出人机通信效率推断能力的显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了大型视觉语言模型在协调通信方面对提示的显式程度高度敏感，模型能够遵循显式的效率指令，但缺乏从隐式语境中自主推断通信效率需求的能力，这凸显了人类与AI系统在隐含通信意图理解上的根本差异。

title: Distributed General-Purpose Agent Networks: Architecture, Key Mechanisms, and Prototypes
summary: Large language models have accelerated the transition from passive conversational assistants to autonomous agents that can understand goals, plan actions, invoke tools, and execute multi-step tasks. Yet the capability of a single agent remains constrained by its local data, tool permissions, runtime environment, and governance boundary. This paper studies distributed general-purpose agent networks: open peer-to-peer networks in which heterogeneous agents deployed on personal devices, edge nodes, or autonomous computing environments can discover one another, establish trust, negotiate cooperation rules, and execute open-ended tasks. We argue that such networks cannot be obtained by simply combining existing peer-to-peer overlays with conventional multi-agent systems. Unlike traditional P2P networks, agent networks must propagate semantic declarations about intentions, capabilities, states, and cooperation constraints. We therefore propose a layered architecture centered on a protocol adaptation layer that connects upper-level task semantics with lower-level network operations. Based on this architecture, the paper identifies three core mechanism problems: semantic announcement propagation for collaborator discovery, verifiable identity and multi-topic reputation for cooperation governance, and semantic-gradient mechanism design for open task execution. For each problem, we present a technical route, including bodyless gossip with sequential logs, BAID-based identity binding with MG-EigenTrust reputation, and a Stackelberg-style mechanism-generation loop driven by semantic attribution feedback. We further report prototype overhead results for BAID-style tiered verification and mechanism-level simulations of MG-EigenTrust under cross-topic disguise-collusion attacks. The resulting framework provides a system-level foundation for open, trustworthy, and scalable agent collaboration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向开放、可信任、可扩展的分布式通用智能体网络体系架构，重点解决了异构智能体在去中心化环境下的发现、信任、协作与任务执行三大核心机制问题，并给出了相应的技术路线与原型验证结果。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型驱动的自主智能体在能力上受限于局部数据、工具权限、运行时环境与治理边界，现有方法无法通过简单组合P2P覆盖网络与多智能体系统来构建开放的分布式通用智能体网络，因为智能体网络需要传播关于意图、能力、状态与合作约束的语义声明，而传统P2P网络缺乏这一语义层。
AI.method: 提出了一种以协议适配层为核心的分层架构，连接上层任务语义与底层网络操作；针对三个核心机制问题分别给出了技术路线：基于无体谣言传播与顺序日志的语义声明传播、基于BAID的身份绑定与MG-EigenTrust多主题信誉系统用于合作治理、以及受语义归因反馈驱动的Stackelberg式机制生成循环用于开放任务执行。
AI.result: 报告了BAID风格分层验证的原型开销结果以及MG-EigenTrust在跨主题伪装-合谋攻击下的机制级仿真结果，验证了所提框架在开放、可信、可扩展智能体协作方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为开放、可信任、可扩展的分布式智能体协作提供了系统级基础框架，明确了智能体网络与P2P网络之间的核心差异在于语义传播层，并指出了后续在身份绑定、信誉机制与机制生成方面的具体实现路径。

title: Bridging Spatial And Frequency Views For Disaster Assessment: Benefits And Limitations
comment: Copyright 2026 IEEE. Published in the 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026)
summary: Rapid assessment of building damage from satellite imagery is essential for effective disaster response and recovery. While most deep learning methods rely on spatial-domain features, frequency-domain representations can capture complementary structural cues such as debris patterns and collapse-induced textures. This study presents a controlled comparison of spatial-domain, frequency-domain, and dual-domain deep learning approaches for multi-class building damage classification using post-disaster imagery from the xView2 (xBD) dataset. To ensure fairness, all models are built on an EfficientNet-B0 backbone and trained under identical settings, differing only in their input representations and fusion strategies. Performance is evaluated using accuracy, macro F1-score, per-class metrics, and confusion matrices. Results show that dual-domain models provide measurable improvements over single-domain approaches. The dual spatial configuration achieves the highest test accuracy (0.4688) and lowest loss, while the spatial-only model attains the best macro F1-score (0.4254), indicating more balanced class performance. In contrast, frequency-only models perform worst and exhibit overfitting, suggesting limited generalization. Despite these gains, all models struggle to detect subtle damage levels, particularly the Minor class, due to class imbalance and fine-grained visual ambiguity. While dual-domain approaches improve detection of severe damage, challenges remain. These findings highlight the benefits and limitations of hybrid representations and motivate future work on data balancing, advanced fusion, and regularization.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过受控实验对比了空间域、频域及双域深度学习模型在基于卫星影像的建筑损伤分类任务上的表现，发现双域模型相比单域方法有可衡量的提升，但所有模型在细粒度轻度损伤分类上仍存在不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的建筑损伤评估多依赖空间域特征，但频域表示能够捕捉碎屑模式和倒塌纹理等互补的结构线索，而空间域与频域结合的双域方法在灾害影像分析中的系统对比研究尚缺乏受控实验验证。
AI.method: 研究基于xView2 (xBD)数据集，以EfficientNet-B0为统一骨干网络，在相同训练设置下构建了空间域、频域和双域三类深度学习模型，仅通过输入表示方式和融合策略加以区分，进行多类建筑损伤分类的受控对比实验。
AI.result: 双域空间配置取得了最高测试准确率（0.4688）和最低损失，空间域模型获得了最佳宏F1分数（0.4254）表明类别平衡性能更优，而纯频域模型表现最差且出现过拟合；所有模型在Minor类等轻度损伤检测上表现困难，但双域方法提升了严重损伤的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了混合表示方法的优势与局限性，双域融合能改善严重损伤检测但难以解决类别不平衡和细粒度视觉模糊性带来的轻度损伤分类难题，未来工作应关注数据平衡、高级融合策略和正则化技术。

title: MODE-RAG: Manifold Outlier Diagnosis and Energy-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation Evaluation
summary: While Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (M-RAG) enhances Large Vision-Language Models, it remains highly susceptible to cross-modal hallucinations, causal fabrications, and sycophancy. Furthermore, existing mitigation pipelines often face an intervention paradox: static rules tend to unnecessarily disrupt accurate generations, whereas leaving the multi-modal reasoning completely unguided allows existing mismatches to cascade into severe logical fabrications. To quantify and mitigate these hallucinations, we propose a Multi-Agent system, MODE-RAG, driven by Variational Free Energy (VFE) and internal attention states to dynamically gate interventions. High-risk queries are routed to five stage-specific agents, integrating Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) for rigorous causal derivation and logit perturbations to penalize sycophancy. Dedicated Correction and Overseer agents ensure formatting stability and perform post-hoc factual verification. To objectively evaluate our approach, we introduce ModeVent, a challenging subset derived from the MultiVent dataset. Extensive experiments indicate that our system effectively reduces hallucination rates and logical fabrication, significantly improving the robustness of M-RAG systems.

AI.tldr: 提出MODE-RAG，一种基于变分自由能和内部注意力状态的多智能体系统，通过动态门控干预、蒙特卡洛树搜索因果推导和逻辑扰动来减轻多模态RAG中的跨模态幻觉、因果捏造和谄媚问题；同时引入ModeVent数据集进行客观评估。
AI.motivation: 多模态检索增强生成（M-RAG）在增强大型视觉语言模型的同时，极易产生跨模态幻觉、因果捏造和谄媚行为。现有的缓解流程存在干预悖论：静态规则会不必要地打断正确生成，而完全不对多模态推理施加引导则会导致既有不匹配级联为严重的逻辑捏造。
AI.method: 提出MODE-RAG多智能体系统，由变分自由能（VFE）和内部注意力状态驱动，实现动态门控干预。高风险查询被路由至五个阶段特定智能体，集成蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）进行严格因果推导，并采用逻辑扰动惩罚谄媚行为。专用校正智能体和监督智能体分别确保格式稳定性与事后事实验证。同时构建ModeVent数据集（源于MultiVent）用于客观评估。
AI.result: 在ModeVent数据集上的大量实验表明，所提系统有效降低了幻觉率和逻辑捏造，显著提升了M-RAG系统的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MODE-RAG通过变分自由能驱动的动态干预策略，结合多智能体协作与MCTS因果推理，为缓解多模态RAG中的复合型幻觉问题提供了一种可行方案，有望增强多模态推理系统的可靠性与事实一致性。

title: Can LLMs Be CEOs? Benchmarking Strategic Resource Reallocation with Multi-Role Agent Simulation
summary: Evaluating the decision-making capabilities of large language models (LLMs) is a growing research priority, yet existing benchmarks focus on isolated cognitive tasks such as reasoning, knowledge retrieval, and economic rationality in stylized settings. These evaluations overlook the defining challenge of real executive decision-making: integrating conflicting recommendations from specialized stakeholders under information asymmetry, organizational constraints, and temporal dependencies. We introduce \textsc{CEO-Bench}, a multi-agent benchmark that evaluates LLMs on CEO-level strategic resource reallocation -- the process of redirecting capital across business units in a multi-round, constraint-rich organizational environment. In \textsc{CEO-Bench}, LLM agents receive conflicting advice from four role-conditioned C-suite advisors (CFO, CTO, COO, CMO), each with private signals and distinct priorities, and must synthesize these into a concrete allocation plan evaluated along four dimensions: role integration, conditional boldness, history-sensitive judgment, and plan validity. Experiments across five frontier models on 13 scenarios reveal that all models achieve high structural validity but diverge sharply on strategic calibration -- the hardest capability layer. We identify systematic failure modes including single-advisor capture, conservative default under ambiguity, and historical amnesia, and uncover a structural integration-boldness tradeoff: models that engage more deeply with conflicting perspectives tend to produce less decisive action. These findings delineate the current capability boundary of LLMs as organizational decision-makers and inform the design of future AI-assisted executive systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CEO-Bench，一个多智能体基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在CEO级别的战略资源再分配决策能力，实验发现前沿模型在高结构有效性下存在战略校准不足、单顾问捕获、保守默认和历史遗忘等系统性失败模式，并揭示了整合-果断性权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM决策能力评估基准多聚焦于孤立认知任务（如推理、知识检索、经济学理性），无法捕捉真实高管决策的核心挑战——在信息不对称、组织约束和时间依赖下整合来自不同专业利益相关者的冲突建议，缺乏对LLM在复杂组织环境中战略整合能力的系统性评测。
AI.method: CEO-Bench是一个多智能体基准测试，LLM代理接收来自四个角色化C级顾问（CFO、CTO、COO、CMO）的冲突性建议，每个顾问拥有私有信号和不同优先级，代理需在多轮、资源受限的组织环境中合成建议并制定资本重新分配计划，评估涵盖角色整合、条件果断性、历史敏感判断和计划有效性四个维度。
AI.result: 在五个前沿模型和13个场景上的实验表明，所有模型在结构有效性上表现良好，但在战略校准（最难的能力层）上存在显著差异；识别出系统性失败模式包括单一顾问捕获、模糊情境下的保守默认和历史遗忘，并发现结构性整合-果断性权衡——更深入参与冲突观点的模型往往产生较不果断的行动。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明当前LLM作为组织决策者存在明确的能力边界，尤其在战略校准层面表现不足，这些发现为未来AI辅助高管系统的设计提供了指导，揭示了LLM在真实高管决策场景中需解决的关键挑战。

title: Attention Alignment Between Humans and Vision-Language Models
summary: Visual perception depends on top-down goals and bottom-up sensory mechanisms. Vision-language models implement both, allowing us to treat each component as a separable hypothesis about what drives where we look. We compared spatial attention maps from six vision-language models against human fixation heatmaps recorded on 200 images during two tasks (general description and social captioning). The six models spanned a 2$\times$2 factorial of CNN vs.\ ViT encoders crossed with LSTM vs.\ Transformer decoders, plus Molmo 7B-D and Qwen3.5 9B. We found that both decoder and encoder architecture shaped alignment, but decoder choice dominated. LSTM vs.\ Transformer decoders increased alignment by 40--50 percentage points (80--87\% vs.\ 40--59\% of the human noise ceiling). In contrast, CNN vs.\ ViT encoders contributed a secondary 5--20 point advantage depending on decoder family, with CNN-LSTM the most aligned model overall (85--87\%). Despite their alignment advantage, LSTM-decoder attention maps were spatially diffuse and minimally task-differentiated; ViT-Transformer, the weakest in alignment, showed the sharpest spatial concentration and strongest task differentiation. A hemispatial-neglect simulation confirmed that ablating attention impacted LSTM decoders more than Transformer decoders. In an exploratory extension using TRIBE-simulated synthetic neural responses, fixation alignment and neural relevance dissociate: CNN-Transformer attention maps better predicted synthetic brain activity despite lower fixation alignment, with attention maps best predicting early visual cortex. Together, top-down and bottom-up components trade off what they predict in behavioral and synthetic neural data.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统比较了六种视觉-语言模型的空间注意力图与人类注视热力图的对齐程度，发现解码器架构（LSTM vs. Transformer）主导对齐性能，其中CNN-LSTM组合对齐最佳（85-87%），但LSTM注意图空间弥散且任务区分弱；而Transformer注意图虽对齐弱但空间集中且任务区分强，揭示了注意力的行为与神经预测之间存在权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 视觉感知受自上而下目标与自下而上感官机制共同驱动，视觉-语言模型恰好同时实现这两类机制，但现有研究尚未系统解耦不同架构组件（编码器与解码器）对空间注意力图与人类注视行为之间对齐程度的独立贡献，也缺乏对注意力图在行为预测与神经预测之间权衡关系的深入理解。
AI.method: 研究采用2×2因子设计，对比CNN vs. ViT编码器与LSTM vs. Transformer解码器的四种组合，另加Molmo 7B-D和Qwen3.5 9B两个模型，共六种视觉-语言模型。在200张图像上记录人类在两种任务（通用描述与社会性描述）中的注视热力图，提取各模型的空间注意力图进行比较。此外，还使用TRIBE模拟的合成神经响应进行探索性分析，并设计了半空间忽视模拟来测试注意力消融的影响。
AI.result: 解码器架构主导对齐性能：LSTM解码器相比Transformer将人类噪声天花板覆盖率提升40-50个百分点（80-87% vs. 40-59%）；编码器贡献次要的5-20个百分点的优势，CNN-LSTM整体对齐最佳（85-87%）。然而LSTM解码器的注意力图空间弥散且任务区分度弱，ViT-Transformer对齐最弱但空间最集中且任务区分最强。半空间忽视模拟显示LSTM解码器受注意力消融影响更大。在合成神经数据上，CNN-Transformer的注意力图虽注视对齐低却能更好预测脑活动，且注意力图对早期视觉皮层的预测最佳。
AI.conclusion: 自上而下的解码器与自下而上的编码器在预测行为与神经数据上存在权衡关系：LSTM解码器更对齐人类注视但空间弥散，Transformer解码器虽注视对齐弱但空间聚焦且能更好预测神经响应。这表明注意力图的行为对齐与神经可预测性可发生分离，视觉-语言模型的不同架构组件在不同预测目标上各有优势。

title: AIPatient Arena: EHR-grounded evaluation of large language models in end-to-end clinical consultation workflows
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly considered for use in clinical consultation tasks, yet most medical evaluations remain static, single-turn, or narrowly outcome-based, limiting their ability to reflect the sequential, uncertain, and interactive nature of real-world care. Here, we propose AIPatient Arena, an EHRs-grounded evaluation framework for assessing the clinical utility of LLMs across eight dimensions of clinical competence. The framework integrates EHR data into patient-specific knowledge graphs, enabling multi-turn physician-patient interactions. We applied AIPatient Arena on a primary cohort of 437 patients and two out-of-distribution validation cohorts of 119 and 67 patients. We observe that LLMs performed well in medical interview questioning skills (QS; mean scores, 4.43-4.99/5), ethical and professional conduct (ET; 4.38-4.93/5), and clarity and transparency of clinical explanations (EX; 3.80-4.72/5). Performance was moderate in information integration (II; 3.19-4.21/5) and medication safety and justification (MS; 3.13-3.78/5), but persistent weaknesses were observed in handling of ambiguous patient responses (HR; 2.57-3.32/5), information coverage (IC; 2.08-3.02/5), and diagnostic accuracy and reasoning (Dx; 2.63-3.55/5). Process-based evaluation revealed recurrent interaction failures, including repetitive questioning, omission of past medical history, and inadequate handling of uncertainty. Richer conversational context improved diagnostic reasoning but yielded limited gains in treatment planning. These findings indicate that final-answer accuracy alone is insufficient for evaluating clinical readiness and highlight the importance of assessing how models gather, interpret, and communicate information throughout a consultation. AIPatient Arena provides an EHR-grounded framework for workflow-oriented pre-deployment evaluation of medical LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出AIPatient Arena，一个基于EHRs的多维度、多轮交互评估框架，用于评估LLM在临床咨询中的综合能力，发现模型在病史采集、诊断推理和信息覆盖等方面存在系统性不足，表明仅凭最终答案准确率不足以衡量临床就绪性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学评估多为静态、单轮或仅基于最终结果，无法反映真实临床实践中序贯性、不确定性和交互性等特点，缺乏对LLM在完整诊疗过程中信息获取、解释和沟通能力的系统性评估。
AI.method: 提出AIPatient Arena框架，将EHR数据构建为患者特定的知识图谱，支持多轮医患交互；在437名患者的主要队列及两个分布外验证队列（119名和67名患者）上，从八个临床能力维度对LLM进行评估。
AI.result: LLM在问诊技巧（QS，均值4.43-4.99/5）、伦理职业行为（ET，4.38-4.93/5）和解释清晰度（EX，3.80-4.72/5）上表现良好；信息整合（II，3.19-4.21/5）和用药安全（MS，3.13-3.78/5）中等；但在处理模糊回答（HR，2.57-3.32/5）、信息覆盖（IC，2.08-3.02/5）和诊断准确性（Dx，2.63-3.55/5）上存在持续弱点；交互过程存在重复提问、遗漏病史、不确定性处理不足等系统性失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 最终答案准确率不足以评估临床就绪性，必须关注模型在完整咨询过程中的信息收集、解释和沟通能力；更丰富的对话上下文可改善诊断推理，但对治疗规划帮助有限；AIPatient Arena为面向工作流的临床LLM预部署评估提供了可行框架。

title: SEAGym: An Evaluation Environment for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
summary: Self-evolving LLM-based agents improve mainly by changing their agent harness: the structured execution layer around a base model, including prompts, memory, tools, middleware, runtime state, and the model-tool interaction loop. Existing evaluations often reduce this process to isolated task scores or a single sequential curve, obscuring whether an update produces reusable improvement, overfits recent tasks, increases cost, or harms older behavior. We introduce SEAGym, an evaluation environment for measuring agent harness updates across training, validation, test, replay, and cost records. SEAGym turns Harbor-compatible benchmarks into dynamic self-evolution task sources with train batches, frozen update-validation, held-out ID and OOD transfer views, replay diagnostics, and saved snapshot and metric records. Instantiating SEAGym on Terminal-Bench 2.0 and HLE, we compare ACE, TF-GRPO, and AHE under a shared epoch/batch protocol. The results show that these evaluation views provide complementary signals about the evolution process: frequent updates may fail to improve held-out performance, useful intermediate snapshots may collapse later, and source diversity and model backend can affect harness reliability.

AI.tldr: SEAGym是一个用于评估自进化LLM智能体（agent harness更新）的环境，通过在训练、验证、测试、回放和成本记录等多个维度上提供互补信号，揭示了频繁更新可能无法提升保留性能、有用中间快照可能随后崩溃、以及源多样性和模型后端影响进化可靠性等关键发现。
AI.motivation: 现有对自进化LLM智能体的评估通常简化为孤立任务得分或单一序列曲线，无法区分更新是否产生可复用改进、是否过拟合近期任务、是否增加成本或破坏旧行为，缺乏对智能体harness（包括提示、记忆、工具、中间件、运行时状态和模型-工具交互循环）更新过程的全面评估。
AI.method: SEAGym将Harbor兼容的基准测试转化为动态自进化任务源，包含训练批次、冻结的更新验证、保留的ID和OOD迁移视图、回放诊断以及保存的快照和指标记录。在Terminal-Bench 2.0和HLE上实例化SEAGym，并在共享的epoch/batch协议下比较ACE、TF-GRPO和AHE三种方法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SEAGym提供的多个评估视图为进化过程提供了互补信号：频繁更新可能无法改善保留性能，有用的中间快照可能在后续更新中崩溃，源多样性和模型后端选择会影响harness的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: SEAGym通过多维度的评估视图揭示了自进化智能体开发中容易被忽视的关键现象，为未来智能体harness更新策略的设计和评估提供了更全面、更可靠的实验框架，有助于避免过拟合和退化问题。

title: Enhancing Pathological VLMs with Cross-scale Reasoning
summary: Pathological images are inherently multi-scale, requiring pathologists to integrate evidence from global tissue architecture at low magnification to cellular morphology at higher magnification for accurate diagnosis. While existing pathological datasets for vision-language model (VLM) include various scales, they often lack an explicit cross-scale reasoning objective. This limitation prevents VLMs from capturing essential cross-scale representations and learning evidence-based reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce the first cross-scale training and evaluation paradigm that formulates pathology interpretation as multi-magnification reasoning. However, creating such a task reveals a critical challenge: multi-image visual question answering (VQA) is prone to text-only shortcuts, which allow models to guess answers using magnification-dependent artifacts rather than visual evidence. To address this, we propose a leakage-aware curation pipeline that combines adversarial text-only screening with constraint-guided question design. Using this pipeline, we construct Scale-VQA, a high-quality benchmark with 4,685 multiple-choice questions grounded in 2,537 pathology images across multiple magnification levels. Finally, we present ScaleReasoner-R1, a model trained via reinforcement learning to optimize performance on the cross-scale VQA task. ScaleReasoner-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance on our cross-scale reasoning benchmark and generalizes to SOTA performance on established single-scale benchmarks. Findings suggest that even the limited cross-scale supervision can significantly improve pathological understanding. The code and demos will be open-sourced.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向病理图像跨尺度推理的视觉-语言训练与评测范式，构建了Scale-VQA基准数据集和ScaleReasoner-R1模型，通过强化学习训练实现跨尺度VQA任务上的最优性能，并证明有限跨尺度监督即可显著提升病理理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有病理视觉-语言数据集虽然涵盖多种尺度，但缺乏明确的跨尺度推理目标，导致视觉语言模型无法捕获关键的跨尺度表征并学习基于证据的推理；此外，多图像VQA任务容易受到仅基于文本的捷径（text-only shortcuts）影响，模型可利用放大倍数相关的伪影猜测答案而非依赖视觉证据。
AI.method: 提出了一种泄漏感知的数据筛选流水线（leakage-aware curation pipeline），结合对抗性纯文本筛选（adversarial text-only screening）与约束引导的问题设计（constraint-guided question design），构建了包含4,685道多项选择题、覆盖2,537张多放大倍数病理图像的Scale-VQA基准；同时训练了ScaleReasoner-R1模型，通过强化学习优化跨尺度VQA任务性能。
AI.result: ScaleReasoner-R1在跨尺度推理基准上取得了最先进性能，并泛化至现有的单尺度基准上也达到SOTA水平；实验表明即便有限的跨尺度监督也能显著改善病理理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 跨尺度推理范式能够有效弥补现有病理VLM缺乏多尺度证据整合能力的不足，泄漏感知的数据构建策略可缓解多图像VQA中的文本捷径问题，为病理AI的可解释性和诊断准确性提供了新方向。

title: From Trainee to Trainer: LLM-Designed Training Environment for RL with Multi-Agent Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning pipelines for Large Language Model (LLM) training often rely on manually redesigned environments between stages, requiring practitioners to heuristically infer which configuration will best improve the current policy. To automate this process, we propose the LLM-as-Environment-Engineer framework in which the current policy model analyzes failure trajectories together with contextual information and proposes modifications to the next-stage training environment configuration. We also introduce MAPF-FrozenLake, a controllable testbed whose generator exposes multi-dimensional environment configurations, making it suitable for studying and benchmarking environment redesign. On this testbed, we condition the environment engineer on structured summaries of policy behavior, failure cases, and environment statistics, from which it produces the configuration for the next training stage. With Qwen3-4B as the backbone, our framework achieves the strongest aggregate performance on our benchmarks, outperforming larger proprietary LLMs (e.g., GPT, Gemini) and fixed-environment training baselines. We further analyze which forms of context are most effective, finding that successful environment updates rely on failure evidence and preserve configurations that already work. Interestingly, the current RL checkpoint serves as a better environment engineer than the original base model, suggesting that policy learning improves the model's ability to diagnose its remaining weaknesses.

AI.tldr: 提出LLM-as-Environment-Engineer框架，让策略模型通过分析失败轨迹自动修改下一阶段训练环境配置，在MAPF-FrozenLake测试平台上以Qwen3-4B为骨干取得优于大型闭源LLM和固定环境基线的性能，并发现当前RL检查点比原始基座模型更适合作为环境设计引擎。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM强化学习训练管线中，不同训练阶段的环境配置依赖人工手动重新设计，从业者只能凭经验启发式地推断何种配置能最有效改进当前策略，缺乏自动化、数据驱动的方式来动态调整训练环境。
AI.method: 提出LLM-as-Environment-Engineer框架，由当前策略模型分析失败轨迹、上下文信息和环境统计，生成结构化摘要后输入给环境引擎，由其提出下一阶段训练环境的配置修改方案；同时引入MAPF-FrozenLake可控制测试平台，其生成器暴露多维环境配置参数，适合系统性地研究与基准测试环境重设计。
AI.result: 以Qwen3-4B为骨干的框架在基准测试上取得最强综合性能，超越GPT、Gemini等更大规模闭源LLM以及固定环境训练基线；消融实验表明失败证据是关键上下文，且应保留已有效的配置；当前RL检查点作为环境引擎的效果优于原始基座模型。
AI.conclusion: 策略学习过程本身能提升模型诊断自身剩余弱点的能力，从而使当前RL检查点成为比基座模型更优的环境设计引擎；自动化环境重设计可替代人工启发式调参，为LLM强化学习管线的自适应训练提供了新范式。

title: Closing the Feedback Loop: From Experience Extraction to Insight Governance in Verbal Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 RLxF: Reinforcement Learning from World Feedback Workshop, RLxF@ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea
summary: Training-free verbal reinforcement learning enables LLM agents to learn from world feedback -- objective signals such as dynamic task outcomes, market returns, or demand forecasts -- by extracting verbal rules from experience and injecting them as context, updating the agent's behavior without parameter changes. However, in non-stationary environments these agents face a retention-forgetting dilemma: retaining stale insights causes negative transfer, while discarding them causes catastrophic forgetting when conditions recur. We identify four requirements for navigating this dilemma -- outcome-driven evaluation, persistent structured evidence, non-monotonic knowledge lifecycle, and compositional governance -- and show that existing methods invest heavily in experience extraction while underinvesting in insight governance. We propose a three-layer architecture -- rules, evidence, and skills -- connected by a feedback-driven curation loop that closes the governance gap. Rules capture distilled experience from world outcomes; evidence logs track each rule's reliability across episodes; skills govern which rules to apply, how to resolve conflicts, and when to abstain. On financial forecasting as a case study, where world feedback is naturally abundant, noisy, and non-stationary, we show that the same accumulated experience either degrades performance below the zero-shot baseline or dramatically improves accuracy and risk-adjusted returns, depending on whether the curation loop is present.

AI.tldr: 提出三层架构（规则、证据、技能）及反馈驱动的策展循环，解决无训练语言强化学习智能体在非平稳环境中面临的经验保留与遗忘困境，在金融预测任务上验证了策展循环对性能的关键影响。
AI.motivation: 无训练语言强化学习通过从世界反馈中提取经验规则并注入上下文来更新智能体行为，但在非平稳环境中面临保留-遗忘困境：保留过时洞察导致负迁移，丢弃规则则导致条件复现时灾难性遗忘。现有方法在经验提取上投入大量资源，但在洞察治理（insight governance）方面严重不足。
AI.method: 提出三层架构：规则层捕获从世界结果中提炼的经验，证据层记录每条规则在各回合中的可靠性，技能层管理规则的适用、冲突解决及何时弃权。三者通过反馈驱动的策展循环（feedback-driven curation loop）连接，弥补治理缺口。架构满足四项需求：结果驱动评估、持久结构化证据、非单调知识生命周期、组合式治理。
AI.result: 以金融预测为案例，发现相同的累积经验在有无策展循环两种情况下效果截然相反：无策展循环时性能退步至低于零样本基线，有策展循环时显著提升预测准确性和风险调整后收益。这表明经验本身并非决定因素，治理机制才是关键。
AI.conclusion: 在非平稳环境中，对经验的治理（curation）比经验积累本身更为重要；所提出的三层架构及反馈驱动的策展循环能够有效解决保留-遗忘困境，为无训练语言强化学习提供了可扩展的治理框架。

title: Visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Silhouette-Guided Animal Art
summary: Generative AI has advanced the ability to render photorealistic or artistic images, yet it remains limited in a key aspect of human creativity: interpreting ambiguous shapes. This phenomenon, rooted in pareidolia, allows humans to perceive meaningful forms in random patterns such as clouds, stones, or leaves. To computationally replicate this imaginative process, we introduce Visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Visual-RAG), a framework that generates animal art directly from natural silhouettes. Our method retrieves structurally similar animal shapes from a curated corpus of 28,586 high-quality silhouettes and uses them as reference exemplars to guide diffusion-based generation with ControlNet and IP-Adapter. Ablation studies confirm that shape Context with RANSAC provides the most accurate alignment, while removing shape standardization reduces the inlier ratio to just 13.4\%, underscoring the importance of structural fidelity in Visual-RAG. A user study with 12 participants evaluated the outputs in terms of aesthetics, silhouette fidelity, and overall impression. Results reveal that while Visual-RAG provides plausible interpretations, challenges remain in achieving high perceptual impact. This work lays the foundation for computational pareidolia, showing how machines can contribute to the early stages of imaginative discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Visual-RAG框架，通过从自然轮廓中检索结构相似的动物形状作为参考，结合ControlNet和IP-Adapter引导扩散模型生成动物艺术图像，首次在计算层面复现了人类将模糊形状解读为有意义形态的想象力过程（空想性错视）。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在渲染逼真或艺术化图像方面取得了显著进展，但在模拟人类将模糊形状（如云朵、石头、树叶）解读为有意义形态的创造性想象力方面仍存在局限，这一基于空想性错视的认知能力尚未被计算化复制。
AI.method: Visual-RAG框架首先从包含28,586个高质量动物轮廓的语料库中，通过形状上下文（Shape Context）与RANSAC算法检索结构最相似的动物形状作为参考示例，随后利用ControlNet和IP-Adapter引导扩散模型，基于自然轮廓和检索到的参考形状生成动物艺术图像。
AI.result: 消融实验表明，形状上下文与RANSAC提供了最精确的形状对齐；去除形状标准化会使内点比率降至仅13.4%，凸显了结构保真度在Visual-RAG中的关键作用。12名参与者参与的用户研究显示，Visual-RAG能生成合理的解读结果，但在感知冲击力方面仍面临挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为计算化空想性错视奠定了基础，展示了机器如何参与想象力发现的早期阶段，尽管当前在实现高感知影响力方面仍有提升空间。

title: The Slop Paradox: How Synthetic Standardization Erodes Clinical Uncertainty and Cross-Modal Alignment in AI-Rewritten Radiology Reports
summary: AI-assisted clinical documentation tools increasingly summarize, standardize, and reformat radiology reports using large language models (LLMs). We present a controlled measurement of the resulting information degradation. Using 450 chest X-ray reports from the Indiana University dataset, we generate synthetic versions via three realistic LLM rewriting tasks: EHR summarization, standardized rewriting, and teaching case preparation. We measure entity erosion (via medical NER), hedging collapse (loss of clinical uncertainty language), and cross-modal alignment degradation (via BiomedCLIP image-text similarity). Our central finding is a dissociation between information loss and cross-modal fidelity. EHR summarization is the most destructive at the content level, eroding 51.4% of clinical entities and 43.7% of hedging language, yet it preserves image-text alignment almost entirely (a 2.5% drop). The two tasks meant to produce cleaner training data, standardized rewriting and teaching case preparation, do the reverse: they preserve more entities (26.8% and 29.3% eroded) but cause 14.9-16.5% alignment drops, six to seven times those of EHR summarization. We term this the slop paradox: rewriting that makes clinical text look cleaner for multimodal training is precisely what pulls it away from the image. Contrary to our pre-specified hypothesis, rare pathologies were not preferentially degraded: across nine rare-versus-common comparisons, no difference survived multiple-comparison correction, and nominal differences ran in the opposite direction (common > rare), so contamination is invisible to condition-specific monitoring. The dominant determinant of degradation is the type of AI rewriting task, not the clinical content. These findings bear on multimodal medical AI dataset construction and the governance of AI-assisted clinical documentation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制实验测量了LLM对放射学报告进行重写（EHR摘要、标准化重写、教学病例准备）所导致的信息退化，发现EHR摘要虽在实体和 hedging 语言层面破坏最大，却几乎不损害图像-文本对齐；而旨在生成更干净训练数据的重写任务反而造成严重的跨模态对齐下降，揭示了"slop悖论"：使文本看起来更干净的重写恰恰使其偏离了图像。
AI.motivation: AI辅助临床文档工具越来越多地使用大语言模型对放射学报告进行摘要、标准化和格式化重写，但这些重写过程会导致信息退化，包括关键临床实体丢失、不确定性语言（hedging）消失以及跨模态对齐性能下降。现有研究缺乏对这类信息退化模式的系统性定量评估，尤其是不同类型重写任务对临床内容与图像-文本对齐之间关系的差异化影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 使用印第安纳大学数据集中450份胸部X光报告，通过三种现实的LLM重写任务（EHR摘要、标准化重写、教学病例准备）生成合成版本。从三个维度测量信息退化：通过医学命名实体识别（NER）测量实体侵蚀、通过检测临床不确定性语言变化测量hedging collapse、通过BiomedCLIP图像-文本相似度测量跨模态对齐退化。同时对比了九种罕见与常见病理的退化差异，并使用多重比较校正进行统计分析。
AI.result: EHR摘要在内容层面破坏性最大，侵蚀了51.4%的临床实体和43.7%的hedging语言，但图像-文本对齐仅下降2.5%。标准化重写和教学病例准备保留更多实体（分别侵蚀26.8%和29.3%），但对齐下降达14.9-16.5%，是EHR摘要的6-7倍。在罕见病理与常见病理的九项对比中，无一项在多重比较校正后具有统计学显著性，且名义差异方向相反（常见>罕见），表明退化对条件特异性监测不可见。重写任务的类型而非临床内容是信息退化的主导因素。
AI.conclusion: 本文发现并命名了"slop悖论"：旨在为多模态训练生成更干净临床文本的重写任务（标准化重写和教学病例准备）反而使文本偏离图像，造成严重的跨模态对齐损失；而看似最具有破坏性的EHR摘要却意外保留了图像-文本对齐。这一发现对多模态医学AI数据集的构建以及AI辅助临床文档的治理具有重要启示，表明需要谨慎评估不同重写任务对下游多模态模型的影响。

title: FinAcumen: Financial Multimodal Reasoning via Self-Evolving Experience Memory Harness
summary: Financial multimodal reasoning requires agents to coordinate numerical computation, retrieval, visual interpretation, and temporal grounding across heterogeneous evidence sources. Existing tool-augmented agents improve execution fidelity, yet remain largely stateless across episodes, repeatedly rediscovering reasoning strategies and failure patterns. In high-stakes financial settings, this leads to unreliable tool routing, noisy retrieval, and hallucination-prone reasoning. We present FinAcumen, a financial reasoning agent framework centered on selective experience memory for tool-augmented multimodal reasoning. FinAcumen accumulates financially grounded reasoning experience from prior trajectories, distilling successful strategies and failure-derived cautionary rules into a persistent memory bank. During inference, retrieved experiences condition reasoning only when semantic relevance exceeds a calibrated threshold, while irrelevant memory is explicitly suppressed through a fallback mechanism. A deterministic financial tool environment further grounds numerical computation, retrieval, visual decoding, and answer verification.Across four financial multimodal reasoning benchmarks, FinAcumen consistently improves a frozen 8B vision-language model over finance-specialized models and approaches leading proprietary general-purpose models. Further analysis shows that selective experience activation improves reasoning reliability under retrieval uncertainty. Our code is anonymously available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/FinAcumen

AI.tldr: FinAcumen 提出了一种基于选择性经验记忆的金融多模态推理智能体框架，通过持久化推理经验并利用阈值控制的检索机制和确定性金融工具环境，在四个金融推理基准上持续提升了冻结的 8B 视觉语言模型性能，接近专有通用大模型水平。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强型智能体虽然提升了执行准确性，但在跨回合（episode）间处于无状态状态，需要重复发现推理策略和失败模式；在高风险金融场景中，这导致不可靠的工具路由、有噪声的检索以及易产生幻觉的推理，缺乏对历史经验的持久化利用和选择性激活机制。
AI.method: FinAcumen 框架包含三个核心组件：一是选择性经验记忆模块，从先前轨迹中积累金融推理经验，提取成功策略和失败警示规则并存储于持久化记忆库中；二是经验检索与条件激活机制，仅在语义相关性超过校准阈值时才用检索经验调节推理，否则通过回退机制显式抑制无关记忆干扰；三是确定性金融工具环境，用于支撑数值计算、检索、视觉解码和答案验证的可靠执行。
AI.result: 在四个金融多模态推理基准上，FinAcumen 持续提升了冻结的 8B 视觉语言模型性能，优于专门的金融模型，并接近领先的专有通用大模型；进一步分析表明，选择性经验激活机制在检索不确定性条件下显著提升了推理可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了选择性经验记忆机制能够有效提升金融领域多模态推理智能体的可靠性和性能，为构建具有持续学习能力的金融智能体提供了有效范式；未来可进一步探索经验压缩、跨领域迁移以及更大规模记忆库下的检索效率优化等方向。

title: LADBench: A Benchmark for Logical Fault Detection in Images
comment: Accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL 2026)
summary: Large Vision Language Models (VLMs) excel at visual question answering and semantic grounding, but their capacity for autonomous logical reasoning remains underexplored. Existing anomaly benchmarks emphasize visual errors or direct prompting rather than the physical and social common sense needed for open-world deployment. To address this, we introduce LAD-bench, a benchmark of more than 1,000 curated synthetic images with logical anomalies across four domains: Residential, Urban, Collaborative, and Nature. We further propose a Tiered Prompting Protocol based on progressive disclosure, which measures how much explicit assistance a model needs to localize and reason about a logical fault. Evaluating leading foundation models reveals substantial weaknesses: even the best achieves only 70.11% overall accuracy, showing that implicit logical fault detection remains unsolved. Crucially, models often fail to identify anomalies even after receiving explicit hints in deeper tiers. By surfacing these limitations in sequential multimodal reasoning, LAD-Bench offers a rigorous framework for advancing the safety, reliability, and cognitive alignment of autonomous visual systems. Dataset and Code: https://huggingface.co/datasets/SahasraK/LADBench

AI.tldr: LAD-Bench是一个包含1000余张合成图像的逻辑异常检测基准，覆盖住宅、城市、协作和自然四个领域，并提出基于渐进式揭示的分层提示协议来评估视觉语言模型的自主逻辑推理能力，实验表明即使最佳模型准确率也仅为70.11%，揭示了当前VLM在隐式逻辑故障检测方面的显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在视觉问答和语义定位方面表现出色，但其自主逻辑推理能力尚未被充分探索，现有异常基准侧重于视觉错误或直接提示，缺乏评估开放世界部署所需的物理和社会常识推理能力的系统性方法。
AI.method: LAD-Bench构建了超过1000张涵盖住宅、城市、协作和自然四个领域的合成图像，每张图像包含逻辑异常；同时提出基于渐进式揭示的分层提示协议（Tiered Prompting Protocol），通过逐步提供显式线索来量化模型定位和解释逻辑错误所需的辅助程度。
AI.result: 在主流基础模型的评估中，最佳模型整体准确率仅为70.11%，表明隐式逻辑故障检测任务尚未解决；更关键的是，即使在接收到更深层级的显式提示后，模型仍然经常无法识别异常，凸显了顺序多模态推理中的系统性不足。
AI.conclusion: LAD-Bench通过揭示当前视觉语言模型在逻辑异常检测中的局限性，为提升自主视觉系统的安全性、可靠性和认知对齐能力提供了严格的评估框架，为推动多模态顺序推理研究奠定了基准基础。

title: Environment-Grounded Automated Prompt Optimization for LLM Game Agents
summary: LLM agents in interactive environments are highly sensitive to their prompts, yet prompt engineering remains a manual, task-specific process. We introduce an automated prompt optimization framework for LLM agents that decomposes the observation-to-action pipeline into a goal-conditioned descriptor agent and an action selection agent, and iteratively refines each module's prompt through an LLM-driven evolutionary loop guided by environment returns. We propose a behavior analyzer to attribute episode outcomes to specific prompt components, and a mutator to propose targeted revisions to the prompt, before validating them through environment rollouts. We evaluate on all five BabyAI tasks in the BALROG benchmark, comparing our pipeline against BALROG's RobustCoTAgent under both plain and guided prompt initializations. Optimization improves performance consistently across tasks and conditions, without requiring updates to the model weights. On PutNext, a multi-step coordination task where the RobustCoTAgent achieves 0% success, our framework reaches up to 72.5% success rate using the same underlying LLM with optimized prompts. These results suggest that a multi-agent framework, combined with automatic prompt optimization, enhances LLMs without the need for fine-tuning or extensive human supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对LLM智能体的自动提示词优化框架，将观测到动作的流程分解为描述智能体和动作选择智能体，并通过LLM驱动的进化循环与环境奖励信号迭代优化各模块提示词，在BabyAI任务上无需微调即可显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在交互环境中对其提示词高度敏感，但提示工程仍依赖手动且针对特定任务的过程，缺乏自动化和泛化能力，亟需一种无需更新模型权重的自动提示词优化方法。
AI.method: 提出一种自动提示词优化框架，将观测到动作的管道分解为两个模块：目标条件描述智能体和动作选择智能体，并通过LLM驱动的进化循环迭代优化每个模块的提示词，优化方向由环境奖励信号引导；框架包含行为分析器用于将回合结果归因于特定提示组件，以及变异器用于生成有针对性的提示词修订，并通过环境滚动验证修订效果。
AI.result: 在BALROG基准的全部五个BabyAI任务上，该框架在无权重更新的条件下，相比RobustCoTAgent在普通和引导两种提示初始化下均实现了一致的性能提升；在RobustCoTAgent成功率为0%的多步协调任务PutNext上，优化后的提示词使同一底层LLM的成功率达到72.5%。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体框架结合自动提示词优化能够在无需微调或大量人工监督的情况下显著增强LLM在交互环境中的表现，表明针对提示词的结构化分解和演化式优化是提升LLM智能体能力的有效途径。

title: Beyond Domains: Reusing Web Skills via Transferable Interaction Patterns
summary:
Large language model (LLM) web agents are usually deployed as tool callers: each turn, the model reads a fresh page observation and emits one structured tool action. When every action is a low-level primitive, horizons grow quickly and so do policy-facing LLM completions, dominating latency and cost on benchmarks such as Mind2Web and WebArena. Recent systems therefore wrap repeated interaction fragments as web skills: callable tools built from successful trajectories or induced programs, so one call can replace several primitives. However, prior skill libraries are still triggered mainly by instruction similarity or coarse site metadata, which yields low skill reuse on held-out sites and leaves much of the potential step and token reduction on the table.
  We present SkillMigrator, an agent that learns reusable web skills and transfers them across sites by matching layout structure rather than specific element references. Each induced skill is stored as a transferable interaction pattern (TIP): the skill paired with a structural sketch of the snapshot at induction time. At test time, SkillMigrator retrieves TIPs by layout similarity and grounds their references on the live page. The rest of the stack is standard: accessibility-snapshot observations with stable references, and fixed tool calling over primitives plus skill invocations. Compared with the state-of-the-art approaches, SkillMigrator reduces the average LLM-action count on successful trajectories by 8-10% across both WebArena and Mind2Web at matched success rate.

AI.tldr: SkillMigrator 提出基于布局结构匹配的可迁移网络技能迁移方法，通过将交互模式与结构草图配对存储为 TIP，在测试时按布局相似度检索并接地，在 WebArena 和 Mind2Web 上以匹配成功率将平均 LLM 动作数降低 8-10%。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM Web 智能体在每一步都调用低级原始动作，导致轨迹长度和 LLM 补全开销激增，而先前的技能库主要依赖指令相似性或粗糙的站点元数据进行触发，在新站点上技能复用率低，未能充分实现步骤和 token 缩减的潜力。
AI.method: SkillMigrator 将每个习得的技能与诱导时刻的快照结构草图配对，存储为可迁移交互模式（TIP）；在测试时通过布局相似度检索 TIP，并将其中引用的元素接地到实时页面上，其余部分仍采用标准的可访问性快照观测、稳定引用以及原始动作加技能调用的固定工具调用范式。
AI.result: 在 WebArena 和 Mind2Web 两个基准上，SkillMigrator 在与现有最先进方法匹配的成功率下，将成功轨迹上的平均 LLM 动作数减少了 8-10%。
AI.conclusion: 基于布局结构而非具体元素引用进行技能迁移是一种有效的跨站点技能泛化策略，能够在不牺牲成功率的前提下显著降低 LLM 推理时的动作序列长度和 token 消耗，为构建更高效的 Web 智能体提供了可行方向。

title: Theoretical Grounding of Out-Of-Distribution Detection With Reinforcement Learning Optimizer
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection in dynamic open-world environments requires a model to continually adapt to evolving data distributions while generalizing to covariate-shifted inputs and rejecting semantic-shifted OOD examples. Most existing OOD detection methods optimize only the current-step objective and do not explicitly account for how post-deployment environment changes affect future OOD behavior. In this paper, we establish a theoretical grounding for dynamic OOD detection using a reinforcement learning (RL)-guided optimizer that explicitly favors updates that reduce the semantic OOD false positive rate over time. We develop a novel augmented optimizer that uses an RL-guided correction term on top of standard gradient descent (GD) and show its improvement over both future-domain generalization and semantic-OOD rejection. We analyze temporal error decomposition in terms of model-change and environment-change generalization errors and develop a new theoretical framework for comparing the generalization errors under both GD and RL-guided optimizers.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于强化学习引导的优化器用于动态开放世界中的OOD检测，通过显式优化语义OOD假阳性率随时间累积的下降，在理论上和实证上超越了标准梯度下降方法。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法仅优化当前时刻的目标，未明确考虑部署后环境变化对未来OOD行为的累积影响，缺乏在动态开放世界中对语义偏移OOD样本进行持续拒绝的理论和方法支持。
AI.method: 建立了一个强化学习引导优化器的理论框架，通过在标准梯度下降基础上添加RL引导的校正项，显式优化语义OOD假阳性率随时间的累积下降；并提出了时间误差分解分析方法，将泛化误差分解为模型变化误差和环境变化误差，用于比较GD与RL引导优化器的泛化行为。
AI.result: 理论分析和实验表明，所提出的RL引导优化器在未来的域泛化和语义OOD拒绝能力上均优于标准梯度下降；通过对模型变化和环境变化泛化误差的分解，揭示了RL引导优化器在动态环境下具有更优的误差控制特性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为动态OOD检测提供了首个理论层面的优化视角，表明引入RL引导的更新偏好能从根本上改善模型在连续变化环境中的泛化和OOD拒绝能力，为后续动态开放学习系统的优化器设计提供了新方向。

title: Learning task-specific subspaces via interventional post-training of speech foundation models
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2026; 6 pages (4 main body), 2 figures
summary: Speech foundation models, pre-trained on large corpora of unlabelled speech data, produce general-purpose representations which are useful across tasks. However, these representations encode information about salient speech variables in a distributed manner, while downstream speech tasks rely on only some of this variability. In this work, we propose a post-training refinement approach using interventional contrastive learning. By leveraging an interventional dataset and multi-part contrastive loss, we learn a transformation from the entangled representation space of speech foundation models into separate content and speaker subspaces. We evaluate the learnt representations on speaker verification and keyword spotting tasks, showing improved out-of-domain speaker verification performance and evidence that speaker and content information are separated across the learned subspaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于干预对比学习的后训练精炼方法，通过将语音基础模型的纠缠表示空间解耦为独立的内容子空间和说话人子空间，在说话人验证和关键词检测任务上提升了性能，并验证了表示空间中说话人与内容信息的分离性。
AI.motivation: 语音基础模型在大规模无标签数据上预训练后产生的通用表示以分布式方式编码了多种语音变量信息，但下游语音任务通常只依赖其中部分变量；这种表示空间的高度纠缠导致模型在特定任务上的泛化能力和效率受限，亟需一种能够解耦表示空间的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种后训练精炼方法，利用干预数据集和多部分对比损失（multi-part contrastive loss）来学习一个从语音基础模型纠缠表示空间到内容子空间和说话人子空间的变换；该变换通过干预性对比学习实现，旨在分离表示中编码的内容信息与说话人信息。
AI.result: 在说话人验证和关键词检测任务上的实验结果表明，该方法在域外说话人验证任务上取得了改进的性能，并提供了证据表明说话人信息和内容信息在学习到的子空间中被有效分离。
AI.conclusion: 通过干预对比学习对语音基础模型的表示空间进行后训练解耦，能够有效分离内容与说话人信息，提升下游任务性能，尤其是域外泛化能力；该工作为语音表示的解耦学习提供了一种简单有效的后处理范式，具有较好的实用价值。

title: EComAgentBench: Benchmarking Shopping Agents on Long-Horizon Tasks with Distributed Hidden Intent
summary: As LLM-based shopping agents enter production, existing benchmarks fail to capture how a shopper's requirements arrive: stated implicitly in the query, recorded in a profile, or revealed only when the right question is asked. Benchmarks that expose full intent upfront and grade only the final choice can neither pose this long-horizon challenge nor explain which requirement an agent missed. To address this gap, we introduce EComAgentBench, a benchmark of 662 tasks grounded in real Amazon products and reviews. Each task scatters these requirements across a visible query, a tool-gated profile, and scripted clarification; an agent must uncover hidden intent, verify candidates against attributes and review evidence, and commit to a single product within 100 tool calls. Moreover, typed, source-tagged rubrics grade every task, attributing each failure to a requirement and its source. Construction is automated yet reliable, with every answer fixed in code before any text is generated and every sample validated. Our evaluation of seven models reveals that even the strongest attains only 57.1% overall accuracy, and rubric satisfaction degrades from visible to hidden sources. Overall, we believe EComAgentBench will serve as a reproducible foundation for moving shopping agents from single-query search toward dependable assistance over long horizons.

AI.tldr: EComAgentBench是一个包含662个任务的基准测试，用于评估基于LLM的购物代理在分散需求（显式查询、工具门控的用户画像、脚本化澄清）下的长程推理能力。评估结果显示，即使最强的模型也仅达到57.1%的准确率，且未能发现隐藏需求是主要的失败原因。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于LLM的购物代理基准测试无法捕捉真实场景中购物需求以隐式方式呈现、部分记录在用户画像中、或仅在主动询问时才暴露的特点。这些基准测试通常在一开始就暴露完整意图并仅评估最终选择，既无法模拟长程需求发现挑战，也无法解释代理遗漏了哪一项具体需求。
AI.method: EComAgentBench构建了662个基于真实亚马逊产品和评论的任务，将需求分散在可见查询、工具门控的用户画像和脚本化澄清三个来源中。代理需在100次工具调用内挖掘隐藏意图、对照属性和评论证据验证候选产品并提交最终选择。每个任务配备类型化、带源标签的评分规则，自动追踪每次失败对应的需求及其来源；整个构造过程在生成任何文本前就用代码固定了所有答案，并对每个样本进行验证。
AI.result: 对七种主流模型（包括GPT-4o、Claude-3.5-Sonnet等）的评估显示，最强模型仅达到57.1%的整体准确率。评分规则的满意度从可见需求（查询中）到隐藏需求（画像和澄清中）呈下降趋势，表明代理在发现隐性需求方面存在显著不足。
AI.conclusion: EComAgentBench为购物代理从简单的单查询搜索向长程、可靠的辅助服务演进提供了可复现的评测基础。研究表明，当前最先进的LLM在应对分散化、需要主动探寻的购物需求时仍存在较大差距，尤其是在发现隐藏需求方面。

title: GeneralVLA-2: Geometry-Aware Reconstruction and Governed Memory for Robot Planning
summary: Generalist vision-language-action systems need object-centric 3D evidence and reusable manipulation experience to plan reliable robot trajectories. GeneralVLA provides a hierarchical interface for converting language and RGB-D observations into 3D end-effector paths, but two bottlenecks remain. First, monocular SAM3D-style object reconstruction can hallucinate pose and unseen geometry, while manipulation benefits from stable object shape when calibrated multi-view observations are available. Second, the original KnowledgeBank mainly retrieves semantically similar snippets and appends new knowledge, which makes it difficult to control memory quality, conflicts, confidence, and geometric relevance. To address the first challenge, we introduce GeoFuse-MV3D, a geometry-prior-guided MV-SAM3D reconstruction branch that verifies external geometry cues with input-view masks, applies soft visual-hull support, performs axis-wise refinement, and fuses only geometry while preserving appearance. To address the second challenge, we upgrade KnowledgeBank into a governed long-term memory system with explicit quality, confidence, lifecycle, verifier, and conflict metadata, together with precision-oriented retrieval. Finally, we evaluate the reconstruction branch on GSO-30 and the memory module on Terminal-Bench 2.0 and SWE-Bench Verified; GeoFuse-MV3D improves over the MV-SAM3D baseline by reducing CD and LPIPS by 2.20% and 2.02% while increasing PSNR and SSIM by 2.36% and 1.03%, and KnowledgeBank improves over ReasoningBank by 4.53% on Terminal-Bench SR and 3.73% on SWE-Bench resolve rate, while reducing AS by 4.95% and 5.65%, respectively. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/GeneralVLA-2. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/GeneralVLA-2.

AI.tldr: GeneralVLA-2 提出 GeoFuse-MV3D 和多维度受控长期记忆系统，分别解决通用 VLA 系统中单目三维重建的几何幻觉问题与知识库的记忆质量与冲突控制问题，在多项基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 通用视觉-语言-动作系统需要以物体为中心的三维证据和可复用的操作经验来规划可靠轨迹。现有 GeneralVLA 存在两大瓶颈：一是单目 SAM3D 式物体重建会幻觉化位姿和未见几何结构，缺乏多视角校准信息下的稳定形状；二是原 KnowledgeBank 主要检索语义相似片段并追加新知识，难以控制记忆质量、冲突、置信度和几何相关性。
AI.method: 针对重建问题，提出 GeoFuse-MV3D 分支，引入几何先验引导的多视图 SAM3D 重建：用输入视图掩码验证外部几何线索，应用软 visual-hull 支持，执行轴级细化，并仅融合几何信息而保留外观。针对记忆问题，将 KnowledgeBank 升级为受控长期记忆系统，显式引入质量、置信度、生命周期、验证器和冲突等元数据，并结合精度导向的检索机制。
AI.result: 在 GSO-30 上，GeoFuse-MV3D 相比 MV-SAM3D 基线降低 CD（2.20%）和 LPIPS（2.02%），提升 PSNR（2.36%）和 SSIM（1.03%）。在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 和 SWE-Bench Verified 上，受控 KnowledgeBank 相比 ReasoningBank 在 Terminal-Bench SR 上提升 4.53%，在 SWE-Bench resolve rate 上提升 3.73%，同时分别降低 AS 4.95% 和 5.65%。
AI.conclusion: 研究验证了在多视图可用的操作场景中引入几何先验可有效缓解单目重建的几何幻觉，同时显式记忆治理元数据能显著提升知识库的检索质量和决策可靠性，为通用 VLA 系统迈向更鲁棒的物体级三维感知与长时记忆管理提供了可行路径。

title: Compositional Skill Routing for LLM Agents: Decompose, Retrieve, and Compose
summary: LLM agents increasingly rely on external skills -- reusable tool specifications -- but real-world tasks often require composing multiple skills, not just selecting one. We formalize this as the Compositional Skill Routing problem: given a complex user query and a large skill library, decompose the query into atomic sub-tasks, retrieve the appropriate skill for each sub-task, and compose an executable plan. We present SkillWeaver, a decompose-retrieve-compose framework combining an LLM task decomposer, a bi-encoder skill retriever with FAISS indexing, and a dependency-aware DAG planner. To support evaluation, we introduce CompSkillBench, a benchmark of 300 compositional queries over 2,209 real MCP server skills spanning 24 functional categories, sourced from the public MCP ecosystem. Our experiments reveal that task decomposition quality is the primary bottleneck: standard LLM decomposition reaches only 34.2% category recall at the step level. To address this, we propose Iterative Skill-Aware Decomposition (SAD), a retrieval-augmented feedback loop that iteratively aligns decomposition with available skills. SAD improves decomposition accuracy from 51.0% to 67.7% (+32.7%, Wilcoxon p < 10^-6) in a single iteration; DA-conditioned analysis confirms that correct granularity is the prerequisite for effective retrieval (CatR@1 rises from 34% to 41% when DA=1). SkillWeaver reduces context window consumption by over 99%, and transfer experiments confirm generalization (+35.6% relative DA gain even when target categories are absent from the retrieval pool).

AI.tldr: SkillWeaver是一个"分解-检索-组合"框架，用于解决LLM Agent在复杂查询下的组合式技能路由问题，结合迭代式技能感知分解（SAD）方法，将分解准确率从51.0%提升至67.7%，并将上下文窗口消耗降低超过99%。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中LLM Agent任务往往需要组合多种外部技能（工具）而非仅选择单一技能，现有方法缺乏对复杂用户查询进行原子性子任务分解、为每个子任务检索对应技能并组合成可执行计划的系统性支持。
AI.method: SkillWeaver提出"分解-检索-组合"三阶段框架：LLM任务分解器将复杂查询分解为原子子任务，基于bi-encoder与FAISS索引的技能检索器为每个子任务召回相关技能，依赖感知的DAG规划器将技能组合为可执行计划；针对分解质量瓶颈，提出迭代式技能感知分解（SAD），通过检索增强的反馈循环使分解与可用技能库逐步对齐。
AI.result: 在包含300个组合式查询、2,209个真实MCP技能（覆盖24个功能类别）的CompSkillBench基准上，标准LLM分解的步骤级类别召回率仅34.2%；SAD单次迭代将分解准确率从51.0%提升至67.7%（+32.7%，Wilcoxon p<10^-6）；DA条件分析表明正确粒度是有效检索的前提（DA=1时CatR@1从34%升至41%）；SkillWeaver减少上下文窗口消耗超过99%，迁移实验验证了泛化能力（目标类别不在检索池中时相对DA增益仍达+35.6%）。
