AI.conclusion: 任务分解质量是组合式技能路由的主要瓶颈，迭代式技能感知分解能显著提升分解与技能的对齐程度；正确粒度是有效检索的前提条件，SkillWeaver在极大减少上下文消耗的同时保持了良好的泛化性能。

title: LongWebBench: Evaluating Structural and Functional Webpage Generation in Long-Horizon Settings
summary: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promising progress in generating webpages from visual inputs, yet existing evaluations mainly focus on short, single-screen, and largely static webpages. We introduce LongWebBench, a benchmark for evaluating long-horizon webpage generation from both structural and functional perspectives. LongWebBench contains 490 real-world long webpages for structural fidelity evaluation and 507 goal-oriented interaction tasks over 129 webpages for functional evaluation. It employs two complementary protocols: a multi-dimensional VLM-based metric for assessing long-range structural coherence, and a DOM-augmented agent-based pipeline for end-to-end functional verification. We further examine the automatic evaluation protocols through human agreement analysis. Experiments with state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary VLMs under single-image and multi-image settings reveal that structural fidelity degrades as webpage length increases, while visually plausible generations often fail to support executable multi-step interactions. These results highlight the need to evaluate long webpage generation beyond visual similarity, with executable interaction as a core criterion. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/zheny2751-dotcom/LongWebBench.

AI.tldr: LongWebBench是一个针对长网页生成的基准测试，包含490个真实长网页用于结构评估和507个交互任务用于功能评估，实验表明现有VLM在生成长网页时结构保真度下降，且视觉合理的生成往往无法支持可执行的多步交互。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在从视觉输入生成网页方面取得了进展，但已有评估主要集中于短、单屏且大多静态的网页，缺乏对长序列网页生成的结构保真度和功能完整性的系统评估。
AI.method: LongWebBench包含490个真实长网页用于结构保真度评估和507个目标导向交互任务（覆盖129个网页）用于功能评估；采用两种互补协议：多维VLM指标评估长程结构一致性，以及DOM增强的基于智能体的流水线进行端到端功能验证，并通过人工一致性分析检验自动评估协议的有效性。
AI.result: 在单图像和多图像设置下对开源和闭源VLM的实验表明，结构保真度随网页长度增加而下降，视觉上看似合理的生成往往无法支持可执行的多步交互。
AI.conclusion: 长网页生成评估需要超越视觉相似性，将可执行交互作为核心评价标准。

title: SPHINX: First Explain, Then Explore
summary: Generating adversarial driving scenarios is critical for evaluating and improving autonomous vehicle decision-making systems in simulation. Recent approaches, such as ChatScene and LLM-Attacker, rely primarily on the prior knowledge of Large Language Models and Vision-Language Models to generate driving scenarios procedurally. We argue that adversarial scenes should be generated based on the failure diagnosis (e.g., indecisiveness, multi-frame inconsistency) of the driving policy to specifically address the policy's weaknesses instead of relying on prior assumptions. In this paper, we propose SPHINX, a closed-loop framework for adversarial scenario synthesis guided by a simple principle: first explain, then explore. Beyond blindly exploring the scenario space, SPHINX leverages explainable artificial intelligence methods to analyze the policy, identifying key visual concepts and their influence on policy outputs, and the uncertainty of the decisions. Given the interpretable evidence extracted from the policy's own decision process, we use a vision language model to rationalize and criticize failure modes of the current policy. These critics are then used to generate targeted adversarial scenarios for policy retraining and improvement. We demonstrate that SPHINX can highlight an interpretable account of policy failures while other adversarial scene generation cannot. Across the evaluated benchmarks and test suites, SPHINX can be applied to diverse state-of-the-art autonomous vehicle architectures and yields consistent robustness improvements over existing scenario-generation methods.

AI.tldr: SPHINX提出一种“先解释后探索”的闭环框架，通过可解释AI分析驾驶策略的失效模式，并利用视觉语言模型生成针对性对抗场景，显著提升多种自动驾驶模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗驾驶场景生成方法（如ChatScene、LLM-Attacker）主要依赖大型语言模型或视觉语言模型的先验知识来程序化生成场景，未能基于驾驶策略自身的失效诊断（如决策犹豫、多帧不一致）来针对性解决策略的弱点，导致场景生成缺乏对策略缺陷的精准打击。
AI.method: SPHINX首先利用可解释人工智能方法分析驾驶策略，识别关键视觉概念及其对策略输出的影响以及决策的不确定性；然后基于提取的可解释证据，使用视觉语言模型对当前策略的失效模式进行合理化分析和批评；最后根据这些批评生成有针对性的对抗场景，用于策略的重新训练与改进，形成闭环优化流程。
AI.result: SPHINX能够提供其他对抗场景生成方法无法给出的可解释的失效诊断报告；在多个基准测试和测试套件上的实验表明，该方法可适用于多种最先进的自动驾驶架构，并在鲁棒性提升上一致优于现有场景生成方法。
AI.conclusion: SPHINX证明了基于策略自身决策过程的可解释分析来指导对抗场景生成，比仅依赖模型先验知识更有效，为自动驾驶策略的安全验证与鲁棒性增强提供了一种可解释、可迁移的闭环范式。

title: ConSA: Controllable Sparsity in Hybrid Attention via Learnable Allocation
summary: Hybrid architectures combining full attention (FA) and sliding-window attention (SWA) are a promising paradigm for efficient LLM inference. However, existing methods typically rely on hand-crafted rules or simple post-hoc heuristics for FA/SWA allocation and offer limited analysis of the attention behaviors underlying these designs. We propose Controllable Sparsity in Hybrid Attention (ConSA), a framework that learns optimal FA/SWA assignment under a user-specified sparsity target. ConSA employs L0 regularization to learn binary masks selecting between FA and SWA for each attention unit, while an augmented Lagrangian constraint enforces the target sparsity at either layer or KV-head granularity. We evaluate ConSA on two LLMs at the 0.6B and 1.7B scales. Learned allocations consistently outperform rule-based baselines, with KV-head-wise allocation yielding clear gains over layer-wise allocation. The learned patterns place SWA in the bottom layers and concentrate FA into contiguous middle-layer blocks, diverging from evenly interleaved patterns in rule-based methods. This structure persists across model scales, sparsity levels, and allocation granularities, revealing a fine-grained spectrum of intrinsic attention behaviors that underlies the learned allocation.

AI.tldr: 提出ConSA框架，通过L0正则化和增广拉格朗日约束学习混合注意力架构中全注意力和滑动窗口注意力的最优分配，在不同模型尺度和稀疏度下一致优于基于规则的基线方法，并揭示了底层注意力的细粒度光谱行为。
AI.motivation: 现有混合注意力架构中全注意力与滑动窗口注意力的分配通常依赖手工规则或简单的后验启发式方法，缺乏对注意力行为底层模式的深入分析，难以实现最优的稀疏性分配。
AI.method: 提出Controllable Sparsity in Hybrid Attention (ConSA) 框架，采用L0正则化学习选择全注意力或滑动窗口注意力的二元掩码，并利用增广拉格朗日约束在层粒度或KV头粒度上强制达到用户指定的稀疏度目标。
AI.result: 在0.6B和1.7B两个尺度的LLM上，ConSA学习到的注意力分配一致优于基于规则的基线方法，其中KV头粒度分配显著优于层粒度分配；学习模式将滑动窗口注意力置于底层，全注意力集中在连续的中层模块，与规则方法中均匀交错的模式形成对比，且该结构在不同模型尺度、稀疏度和分配粒度下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了混合注意力中存在一种细粒度的内在注意力行为光谱，其最优分配具有跨尺度和跨设置的一致性结构，为高效LLM推理中的注意力稀疏化设计提供了理论依据和可学习的新范式。

title: StepGuard: Guarding Web Navigation via Single-Step Calibration
summary: Web navigation requires agents to follow natural language goals, interact with web pages, and produce accurate answers. While recent advances leverage vision-language models and reinforcement learning, existing methods still suffer from single-step fragility due to reward misalignment and error propagation. To tackle the reward entanglement, we design Dynamic Dual-Policy Optimization (DDPO), which dynamically switches between a navigation-first mode for exploration and an answer-first mode for question-answering to mitigate reward conflict. To calibrate the single-step error, we propose Confidence-Guided Adaptive Navigation Reflection (CANR), a mechanism that estimates per-step confidence, triggers reflection only when necessary, and uses contrastive rewards to encourage self-correction to calibrate the single-step inaccuracy. With the above as the main components, we finally develop our StepGuard, a new framework of Guarding Web Navigation via Single-Step Calibration. Experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves navigation and answer accuracy, setting new state-of-the-art performance on standard web navigation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出StepGuard框架，通过动态双策略优化（DDPO）解决奖励冲突，并利用置信引导自适应导航反射（CANR）校准单步误差，在标准Web导航基准上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型和强化学习的Web导航方法存在单步脆弱性问题，其根源在于奖励错配导致的多目标冲突以及单步误差的累积传播，阻碍了智能体在长序列导航任务中的稳定性和准确性。
AI.method: StepGuard框架包含两个核心组件：动态双策略优化（DDPO）在导航优先模式（探索）和答案优先模式（问答）之间动态切换以缓解奖励冲突；置信引导自适应导航反射（CANR）通过估计每步置信度、仅在必要时触发反思，并利用对比奖励鼓励自我纠正，从而校准单步不准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，StepGuard在标准Web导航基准上显著提升了导航准确率和答案准确率，取得了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了通过解耦奖励设计和单步误差校准可以有效解决Web导航中长序列决策的脆弱性问题，StepGuard为构建更可靠的自主Web智能体提供了新的框架思路。

title: OmniDrive: An LLM-Choreographed Multi-Agent World Model with Unified Latent Co-Compression for Multi-View Driving Video Generation
summary: Generative world models for autonomous driving face two unresolved tensions: heterogeneous control injection, where free-form language, HD-maps, trajectories, and camera poses reside in incompatible representational spaces, and post-hoc cross-view fusion, where per-camera latents fail to encode global 3-D geometry. We trace both to a single root cause: the absence of a shared symbolic interlingua aligning language, geometry, and pixels at the latent-token level. We present DRIVE-CHOREO, an LLM-choreographed multi-agent world model that recasts controllable multi-view video generation as latent choreography. Three Qwen2.5-VL agents - a Director parsing user intent into a structured WorldScript, a Cartographer grounding it into spatially-anchored layout tokens, and an Auditor feeding cross-view critiques back as auxiliary supervision - jointly author a single position-aware token sequence. This sequence is co-compressed with the multi-view video via a view-time permutation that enforces inter-camera geometry within the convolutional receptive field of a 3-D VAE. On nuScenes, DRIVE-CHOREO sets new state-of-the-art multi-view consistency and BEV mAP (21.6) with competitive FVD (45.7); a detector trained purely on our synthetic data gains +2.4 NDS on the real validation split, validating downstream utility.

AI.tldr: DRIVE-CHOREO提出了一种基于LLM编排的多智能体世界模型，通过引入共享符号中间语（WorldScript）在潜在标记层面统一语言、几何与像素，从而解决自动驾驶生成式世界中异构控制注入与后验跨视角融合两大核心问题，在nuScenes上实现了最先进的多视角一致性与下游检测性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶生成式世界模型面临两个根本性矛盾：一是异构控制注入问题，即自由形式语言、高精地图、轨迹和相机位姿等工作在不相容的表示空间中；二是后验跨视角融合问题，即逐相机潜在表示无法编码全局3D几何信息。两者的共同根源在于缺乏一种在潜在标记层面统一对齐语言、几何与像素的共享符号中间语。
AI.method: DRIVE-CHOREO提出了一种LLM编排的多智能体世界模型，将可控多视角视频生成重构为潜在编舞问题。系统包含三个Qwen2.5-VL智能体：Director将用户意图解析为结构化的WorldScript；Cartographer将WorldScript接地到空间锚定的布局标记中；Auditor提供跨视角批评作为辅助监督。三者共同生成一个位置感知的单一标记序列，该序列通过一种视图-时间置换与多视角视频进行联合压缩，从而在3D VAE的卷积感受野内强制施加跨相机几何约束。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，DRIVE-CHOREO在多视角一致性和BEV mAP（21.6）上均达到最先进水平，FVD为45.7；完全使用该模型合成的数据训练的检测器，在真实验证集上NDS提升了+2.4，验证了下游实用性。
AI.conclusion: DRIVE-CHOREO通过引入共享符号中间语WorldScript并在潜在标记层面统一异构模态，有效解决了自动驾驶世界模型中长期存在的控制注入与跨视角融合问题。其多智能体编排范式和视图-时间置换机制为生成式世界模型提供了新的设计思路，同时合成数据对下游检测任务的积极增益表明了该方法在数据增强和仿真中的实际应用潜力。

title: Security and Privacy Prompts in the Wild: What Users Ask LLMs and How LLMs Respond
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used to fulfill users' information needs; users ask LLMs about the weather, pose educational questions, and consult them for legal assistance. One particularly understudied area is digital security and privacy (S&P), where users may seek LLMs' help on how to secure their online accounts or protect their computers from cyber attacks. To the best of our knowledge, no prior study has collected or analyzed the S&P questions users ask LLMs; prior research on LLM response quality relied on expert-authored S&P misconceptions or FAQs rather than user queries. Drawing from WildChat, a dataset of 3.2M user-LLM conversations collected in the wild, our study identifies 14,727 S&P prompts and categorizes them into nine categories covering a wide range of S&P topics. From the S&P prompts, we sampled 450 and performed a thematic analysis to characterize the S&P questions users ask LLMs. Separate from the thematic analysis, we curated 270 advice-seeking S&P prompts, where users ask for recommendations, guidance, or specific S&P information. We measured LLM response quality and consistency when posing the prompt to LLMs 10 times. We found that commercial LLMs outperform open-weight models (GPT 5.5 provided "good enough" responses on 98% of prompts; Llama 4 on 47%). However, among prompts that received high-quality responses on average, commercial models sometimes produce contradictory responses across runs, risking confusing or misleading users.

AI.tldr: 基于WildChat中320万条真实用户-LLM对话，首次系统性地识别并分析了14727条数字安全与隐私（S&P）相关提示，将其分为9大类；进一步通过主题分析和对270条建议寻求型提示的10次重复查询评估，发现商业模型（GPT-5.5 98%优质响应）显著优于开源模型（Llama 4 47%），但商业模型在跨运行中可能产生矛盾响应，存在误导用户的风险。
AI.motivation: 用户广泛使用大语言模型咨询各类信息需求，但数字安全与隐私（S&P）这一领域的研究严重不足：尚无研究收集或分析用户向LLMs提出的真实S&P问题，此前关于LLM回答质量的研究仅依赖专家撰写的S&P误识或常见问题解答，而非用户真实查询，导致对该场景下LLM表现的评估缺乏现实依据。
AI.method: 从WildChat数据集（320万条真实用户-LLM对话）中筛选出14727条S&P提示，将其归类为9个S&P主题类别；从中抽取450条进行主题分析以刻画用户提问特征；另从S&P提示中筛选270条建议寻求型提示（用户寻求建议、指导或具体信息），对每条提示向LLMs重复查询10次，评估响应质量与一致性。
AI.result: 商业模型（GPT-5.5）在98%的提示上提供了"足够好"的响应，而开源模型（Llama 4）仅达到47%；然而，在平均响应质量较高的提示中，商业模型在不同运行轮次间有时会产生相互矛盾的响应，存在混淆或误导用户的风险。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次基于真实用户查询系统性地揭示了LLMs在S&P领域的表现：商业模型整体响应质量远优于开源模型，但其响应不一致性问题值得警惕，可能对用户造成安全风险；该发现强调了在S&P这一高利害场景中需要更可靠的LLM响应机制和一致性保障。

title: Learn to Quantify Social Interaction with Constraints for Pedestrian Walking
summary: Long-term human path forecasting in crowds is critical for autonomous moving platforms (like autonomous driving cars and social robots) to avoid collision and make high-quality planning. Although the current research take into account social interactions for prediction, they don't reveal the exact kinds of social interactions happened among people and how the social interactions affect the decision-making process of pedestrians, which further limits its robustness. Social interactions in pedestrian walking are intuitively massive and hard to label and quantify. In this paper, we explore creatively to quantify and interpret how pedestrians interact with others by proposing Learn to Cluster. Our clustering social interactions is probabilistic latent variable generative, learning directly from sequential trajectory observations, scalable to arbitrary number of pedestrians. Learn to cluster is label-free and can be naturally integrated into the training process of the prediction model. The latent variables will then serve as 'labels' to categorize social interactions. Extensive experiments over several trajectory prediction benchmarks demonstrate that our method is able to learn the patterns of social interactions and effectively integrate the patterns to pedestrian trajectory prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Learn to Cluster，一种无标签、可扩展的概率潜变量生成方法，用于在行人轨迹预测中量化和解释社交互动模式，实验表明该方法能够有效学习互动模式并提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有行人轨迹预测方法虽考虑社交互动，但未能揭示互动类型及其对决策过程的影响机制，且社交互动难以标注和量化，导致模型鲁棒性受限。
AI.method: 提出Learn to Cluster方法，将社交互动聚类建模为概率潜变量生成过程，直接从序列轨迹观测中学习，可扩展至任意数量行人；该方法无需标签，可自然集成到预测模型的训练中，学到的潜变量作为社交互动的类别标签。
AI.result: 在多个轨迹预测基准数据集上的大量实验表明，所提方法能够有效学习社交互动模式，并将这些模式成功地集成到行人轨迹预测中，提升了预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实现了对行人社交互动的定量化与可解释性建模，为行人轨迹预测中的社交互动理解提供了新范式，潜变量的引入使得无监督的社交互动分类成为可能。

title: Reinforcing Dual-Path Reasoning in Spatial Vision Language Models
summary: Spatial VLMs have made substantial progress in geometric perception, yet complex spatial reasoning requiring multi-step inference over depth, distance, and scene relations remains challenging. Moreover, different spatial queries call for fundamentally different strategies: some are best addressed through purely linguistic, step-by-step deduction, while others require explicit 3D grounding before quantitative inference. We present Dual-Path Spatial Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Spatial VLMs (SR-REAL), a unified framework that equips a spatial VLM with two complementary reasoning paths: Language-Only Reasoning (LOR), which performs step-by-step linguistic deduction, and Detect-Then-Reason (DTR), which detects 3D geometric cues (e.g., centers or bounding boxes) via region tokens before explicit geometric inference. SR-REAL begins with a cold-start supervised fine-tuning stage that constructs LOR and DTR chain-of-thought supervision and exposes a region-to-3D interface, followed by RL that optimizes the policy model with accuracy and format rewards; for DTR, a discrete center-based detection reward further refines geometric alignment. Across diverse spatial benchmarks, SR-REAL significantly outperforms spatial VLM baselines: (i) a single RL-trained model supports both reasoning paths, with DTR excelling in region-aware tasks through precise 3D localization and LOR enhancing general spatial reasoning; (ii) jointly training both paths fosters mutual reinforcement; (iii) high-quality, blended cold-start data is crucial for stable RL optimization; and (iv) the model generalizes across datasets and domains without per-task tuning, demonstrating positive transfer between LOR and DTR.

AI.tldr: SR-REAL提出了一种统一框架，通过强化学习为空间视觉语言模型配备语言推理（LOR）和检测后推理（DTR）两条互补推理路径，在多个空间推理基准上显著超越基线模型，并展示了双路径联合训练带来的互促效果。
AI.motivation: 现有空间视觉语言模型在几何感知方面取得进展，但面对需要多步推理的复杂空间任务（如深度、距离和场景关系推理）仍存在困难；同时，不同类型的空间查询需要根本不同的推理策略，有的适合纯语言逐步演绎，有的需要先显式获取3D几何线索再进行定量推理，现有单一推理路径的方法无法兼顾这两类需求。
AI.method: SR-REAL框架包含两条互补推理路径：LOR（纯语言推理）通过逐步语言演绎完成推理，DTR（检测后推理）先利用区域令牌检测3D几何线索（如中心点或边界框）再进行显式几何推理；框架先经过冷启动监督微调阶段构建LOR和DTR的思维链监督并引入区域到3D的接口，随后采用基于准确率和格式奖励的强化学习优化策略模型，其中DTR还引入离散中心检测奖励以进一步对齐几何信息。
AI.result: 在多个空间推理基准上，SR-REAL显著优于空间VLM基线：单一RL训练的模型可同时支持两条推理路径，DTR在区域感知任务中通过精确定位表现优异，LOR则增强通用空间推理；双路径联合训练产生互促效应；高质量混合冷启动数据对RL稳定优化至关重要；模型无需逐任务调优即可跨数据集和领域泛化，并展现出LOR与DTR之间的正迁移。
AI.conclusion: SR-REAL证明了为空间VLM配备互补推理路径并通过强化学习统一优化的有效性，揭示了显式3D定位与语言演绎在不同空间任务中的互补优势，且双路径联合训练能够实现互促与正迁移，为构建更通用的空间推理模型提供了新范式。

title: Zone of Proximal Policy Optimization: Teacher in Prompts, Not Gradients
summary: Knowledge distillation transfers a teacher's competence to a small student but is brittle in the small-student regime: forcing the student to imitate logits from a much larger teacher concentrates it on the teacher's sharpest modes, hurting generalization on benchmark families beyond the training corpus. Reinforcement learning (RL) avoids logit imitation by training on the student's own rollouts. However, on questions where every rollout fails-yielding zero advantage and being silently discarded-injecting a stronger teacher's response into the policy gradient breaks the on-policy assumption and induces drift. We introduce Zone of Proximal Policy Optimization (ZPPO), inspired by Vygotsky's zone of proximal development, which keeps the teacher inside the prompt rather than the policy gradient. On hard questions, ZPPO constructs two reformulated prompts: a Binary Candidate-included Question (BCQ) pairs one correct teacher response with one incorrect student response as anonymized candidates the student must discriminate, and a Negative Candidate-included Question (NCQ) aggregates the student's wrong rollouts into a single prompt to surface their shared failure modes. A prompt replay buffer recirculates each hard question until it either graduates-the student's mean rollout accuracy on it reaches half- or is FIFO-evicted under finite capacity, amplifying BCQ and NCQ inside the student's current zone of proximal development. On the Qwen3.5 family at four student scales (0.8B-9B) with a 27B teacher, post-trained as vision-language models and evaluated on a 31-benchmark suite (16 VLM, 10 LLM, 5 Video), ZPPO outperforms off/on-policy distillation and GRPO, with the largest gains at the smallest scale.

AI.tldr: 提出区域近端策略优化（ZPPO），通过在提示中而非策略梯度中引入教师信号，并设计二元候选问题（BCQ）和负候选问题（NCQ）两种提示重构策略以及提示重放缓冲机制，解决了知识蒸馏在小模型场景下因强制对数模仿导致的泛化退化问题和强化学习因引入教师响应导致的策略漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏在小学生模型场景下存在脆弱性：强迫小模型模仿大教师模型的对数分布会导致其过度集中于教师最尖锐的模式，从而在训练语料库之外的基准族上损害泛化能力；而强化学习通过使用学生自身轨迹避免了对数模仿，但在所有轨迹均失败的问题上，将教师响应注入策略梯度会破坏在策略假设并引发漂移。
AI.method: 提出区域近端策略优化（ZPPO），核心思想是将教师信号保留在提示中而非策略梯度中。在困难问题上构造两种重构提示：二元候选问题（BCQ）将一个正确的教师响应与一个错误的学生响应配对作为匿名候选供学生区分；负候选问题（NCQ）将学生的错误轨迹聚合成单一提示以暴露共享失败模式。提示重放缓冲对每个困难问题循环使用，直至学生平均轨迹准确率达到一半（毕业）或在有限容量下被先进先出策略淘汰。
AI.result: 在Qwen3.5系列四个学生尺度（0.8B-9B）上以27B教师模型进行视觉-语言模型后训练，并在包含31个基准（16个VLM、10个LLM、5个视频）的评估套件上，ZPPO在离策略/在策略蒸馏和GRPO基线中表现最优，且最小尺度模型上增益最大。
AI.conclusion: ZPPO通过将教师约束置于提示层面而非梯度层面，有效解决了小模型知识蒸馏中的泛化退化与强化学习中的策略漂移问题，尤其在小尺度模型上效果显著，为跨规模知识迁移提供了一种新的范式。

title: How Inference Compute Shapes Frontier LLM Evaluation
summary: AI evaluations are shifting toward harder tasks that benefit from longer trajectories involving tool use and iterative problem solving. As a result, performance is increasingly sensitive to the amount and allocation of compute available at test time ("inference compute"). Yet many evaluations still report performance at a single restrictive budget, meaning that low scores may reflect the evaluation setup rather than the model's underlying capability. To test this, we evaluate up to 12 frontier language models on seven challenging benchmarks spanning software engineering, mathematics, medicine, and cybersecurity. We use a controlled setup combining three simple inference-scaling interventions: larger token budgets, context compaction, and repeated submission attempts, guided either by the model itself or by minimal correctness feedback. We find three main results. First, larger token budgets substantially improve performance on benchmarks across multiple domains, including cybersecurity, FrontierMath, Humanity's Last Exam, and TerminalBench. Second, fixed-budget evaluations can increasingly understate frontier capability as models advance. Newer models reach higher performance at large budgets, where they unlock harder tasks and solve them more reliably. Third, benchmarks differ in which inference-scaling methods help most: repeated submission broadly improves performance, but the value of larger token budgets, external feedback, and parallel attempts varies by benchmark. Overall, our results show that benchmark scores are protocol-dependent. We therefore argue that evaluations should report capability as a function of inference-time compute, specify protocol choices explicitly, and compare model generations over a large shared compute range at matched budgets, especially in safety- or policy-relevant settings.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在七个挑战性基准上对12个前沿语言模型进行受控实验，系统评估了推理时计算预算（包括大token预算、上下文压缩和重复提交尝试）对模型性能的影响，发现固定预算评估会显著低估前沿模型的实际能力，并主张评估应报告能力随推理计算变化的函数关系。
AI.motivation: 随着AI评估转向需要工具使用和迭代求解的更长轨迹的更困难任务，模型性能对测试时推理计算（即推理计算）的分配和数量越来越敏感，然而许多评估仍在单一限制性预算下报告性能，导致低分可能反映评估设置而非模型底层能力，存在显著的评估协议偏差问题。
AI.method: 研究者对最多12个前沿语言模型在软件工程、数学、医学和网络安全七个挑战性基准上进行了受控实验，结合三种简单的推理扩展干预手段：更大的token预算、上下文压缩以及重复提交尝试（由模型自身或最小正确性反馈引导），系统比较不同推理计算预算下的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验发现三个主要结果：第一，更大的token预算能在网络安全、FrontierMath、Humanity's Last Exam和TerminalBench等多个领域的基准上大幅提升性能；第二，固定预算评估会随着模型进步日益低估前沿能力，新模型在更大预算下能达到更高性能并解锁更困难的任务；第三，不同基准对推理扩展方法的敏感性不同，重复提交普遍提升性能，但大token预算、外部反馈和并行尝试的价值因基准而异。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果证明基准分数具有协议依赖性，因此主张评估应报告能力作为推理计算量的函数、明确指定协议选择，并在匹配预算的大共享计算范围内比较模型代际，尤其是在安全或政策相关场景中。

title: TaFD: Threat-Aware Frequency Decoupling for Adversarial Robustness against Heterogeneous Attacks
summary:
Multi-threat robustness remains a fundamental challenge in deep learning. Although joint adversarial training (JAT) is widely adopted, it suffers from negative transfer under heterogeneous threats, particularly between $\ell_p$-bounded and semantic attacks. Through first-order gradient analysis, we formalize this as gradient incompatibility and theoretically establish the necessity of decoupled optimization. We further reveal that these conflicting threats exhibit separable spectral characteristics in the frequency domain. Motivated by this observation, we propose Threat-aware Frequency Decoupling (TaFD), a two-stage defense framework that reformulates JAT as a frequency-domain divide-and-conquer paradigm. TaFD first discovers latent threat domains via unsupervised clustering of attack spectral prototypes and trains a lightweight classifier for inference-time threat domain identification. Conditioned on the prediction, TaFD employs a Frequency-Conditional Convolution that learns threat-domain-specific spectral masks and routes each sample to the corresponding expert, enforcing structural parameter separation and alleviating optimization conflicts.
  We validate TaFD on three representative image-classification benchmarks (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet) and on two representative architectures (the convolutional ResNet and the hybrid-transformer MobileViT). Extensive results demonstrate that TaFD achieves more balanced robustness against heterogeneous attacks than existing JAT and frequency-domain baselines, improving average robust accuracy by approximately 11\% over the strongest baseline while maintaining leading clean accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出威胁感知频率解耦（TaFD）框架，通过频域分治策略将联合对抗训练中的梯度冲突解耦为威胁域特定的优化问题，在多个基准上平均鲁棒准确率提升约11%，同时保持领先的干净准确率。
AI.motivation: 联合对抗训练（JAT）在应对异构威胁（如ℓ_p有界攻击与语义攻击）时存在负迁移问题，其根源在于不同威胁类型的梯度不兼容性，现有方法缺乏对这种冲突的显式解耦机制。
AI.method: 提出威胁感知频率解耦（TaFD）两阶段防御框架：首先通过无监督聚类攻击频谱原型发现潜在威胁域，训练轻量级分类器用于推理时的威胁域识别；然后基于预测结果，使用频率条件卷积学习威胁域特定的频谱掩码，将每个样本路由到对应专家模型，实现结构参数分离以缓解优化冲突。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet三个基准数据集上，使用ResNet和MobileViT两种架构验证，TaFD在异构攻击下实现了比现有JAT和频域基线更平衡的鲁棒性，平均鲁棒准确率较最强基线提升约11%，同时保持领先的干净准确率。
AI.conclusion: 频域分析为理解异构威胁的冲突特性提供了新视角，威胁域感知的参数分离策略可有效缓解联合对抗训练中的负迁移问题，为多威胁鲁棒性研究开辟了频域分治的新范式。

title: ReproRepo: Scaling Reproducibility Audits with GitHub Repository Issues
summary: Reproducing research results from papers and released code is central to scientific progress. Existing works have introduced benchmarks to evaluate whether LLM agents can assist with reproducibility, but they are difficult to scale due to their reliance on substantial manual effort for data curation and evaluation. We introduce ReproRepo, a scalable framework for reproducibility evaluation that leverages human-raised GitHub issues as naturally occurring supervision on realistic reproduction blockers. We instantiate ReproRepo on 1,149 recent machine learning papers from major conferences and evaluate four frontier model-agent configurations. Our results show that LLM agents, even without executing code, can identify many real-world reproducibility problems from paper-repository pairs: the best agent in our study, namely Codex with GPT-5.5, surfaces at least one semantically related human-reported blocker for ~90% of papers in the study. Further analysis shows that agents are particularly effective for surfacing visible failures and identifying the right semantic region, but may still be insufficient in exact localization. ReproRepo can serve as a reusable, scalable framework for future evaluations of LLM agents on real-world reproducibility auditing. Our code is released at https://github.com/LithiumDA/ReproRepo.

AI.tldr: ReproRepo是一个可扩展的AI可重复性评估框架，利用GitHub issue作为自然标注，对1,149篇ML论文进行评测，发现Codex+GPT-5.5配置能识别约90%论文中至少一个与人类报告相关的可重复性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有评估LLM代理能否辅助可重复性的基准测试因依赖大量人工标注和评估而难以扩展，缺乏一个高效、可规模化的自动化评测框架来度量LLM代理在真实场景下发现可重现性问题的能力。
AI.method: 提出了ReproRepo框架，利用GitHub上人类提交的issue作为自然发生的监督信号来评估可重复性；基于1,149篇近期顶级会议ML论文及其代码仓库构建评测数据集，并评估了四种前沿模型-代理配置在无需执行代码的情况下识别论文-仓库对中可重现性问题的能力。
AI.result: 最佳配置Codex with GPT-5.5能对约90%的论文识别出至少一个与人类报告语义相关的可重复性 blocker；代理在发现显性失败和定位正确语义区域方面尤为有效，但在精确定位方面仍存在不足。
AI.conclusion: ReproRepo可作为可复用、可扩展的基准框架，用于未来对LLM代理在真实世界可重复性审计任务上的评估；LLM代理无需执行代码即可识别大量真实可重复性问题，但精确局部化能力仍需提升。

title: MoCo-AIS: A Contrastive Learning Framework for Similarity Computation of Vessel Trajectories
summary: Trajectory similarity is a fundamental task in analyzing mobility patterns, essential for applications such as route pattern extraction, mobility prediction, and anomaly detection. Traditional distance-based measures for computing similarity incur high computational cost, driving the adoption of lightweight learning-based approaches. Supervised methods rely on extensive labels derived from traditional distance measures and often reproduce these metrics, which limits generalization. While self-supervised learning addresses this issue through contrastive learning, it lacks a unified framework, making it difficult to compare deep learning (DL) models for consistent trajectory representation. Accordingly, this paper presents MoCo-AIS, a unified framework for learning vessel trajectory embeddings based on the Momentum Contrast (MoCo) paradigm, which formulates similarity learning through positive and negative trajectory pairs. Within this framework, we evaluate a diverse set of leading DL models on large-scale, real-world vessel-tracking AIS datasets that capture diverse navigation behaviors and operating conditions. Results demonstrate that our framework significantly improves similarity learning over existing baselines, while providing a benchmarking platform for evaluating trajectory representation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoCo-AIS，一个基于动量对比（MoCo）范式的统一框架，用于学习船舶轨迹嵌入，并在大规模真实AIS数据集上评估多种深度学习模型，显著提升了轨迹相似性学习的性能，同时为轨迹表示模型的评估提供了基准平台。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于距离的轨迹相似性度量计算成本高，学习式方法中监督学习依赖大量标签且泛化性差，而自监督对比学习缺乏统一框架，难以系统比较不同深度学习模型的轨迹表示能力。
AI.method: 本文提出MoCo-AIS统一框架，基于动量对比（MoCo）范式，通过构建正负轨迹对进行相似性学习，并在该框架内集成多种主流深度学习模型，在大规模真实船舶跟踪AIS数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在涵盖多种航行行为和运行条件的大规模真实AIS数据集上，MoCo-AIS框架相较于现有基线方法显著提升了轨迹相似性学习性能，并提供了统一的基准平台用于轨迹表示模型的评估与比较。
AI.conclusion: MoCo-AIS为轨迹相似性学习提供了一个有效的自监督统一框架，在提升性能的同时解决了现有方法缺乏可比性的问题，为轨迹表示学习的研究与评估奠定了基准平台基础。

title: TivTok: Broadcasting Time-Invariant Tokens for Scalable Video Tokenization
summary: Video tokenization is fundamental to scalable video generation, as the number of tokens directly determines the computational cost and the length of videos that can be modeled. Existing tokenizers mainly improve scalability by compressing videos into fewer tokens, but they often continue to represent persistent content, such as static backgrounds and consistent object appearances, repeatedly across frames and chunks. In this paper, we propose \textbf{TivTok} (\textit{Time-Invariant Tokenizer}), a reuse-aware video tokenizer that makes persistent information reusable across time. TivTok represents a clip with Time-Invariant (TIV) tokens that encode information shared across frames and Time-Variant (TV) tokens that encode frame-specific residuals. To obtain this factorization, we introduce Scope-Induced Factorization (SIF), which assigns different attention scopes to the two token groups: TIV tokens attend to the full clip, whereas each TV token only accesses its corresponding frame together with the TIV tokens. In the decoder, Invariant Broadcasting (IB) reuses the same TIV tokens across frames and chunks for parallel reconstruction and long-video tokenization. Experiments show that TivTok achieves an rFVD of 12.65 on the standard $16{\times}256{\times}256$ benchmark and improves compression efficiency by 2.91$\times$ for 128-frame videos compared with the evaluated baselines, while using only 1.1\% of the tokens required by downsample-based tokenizers in our evaluation.

AI.tldr: TivTok提出了一种面向视频生成的时不变分词器，通过将视频分解为时不变（跨帧共享）和时变（帧级残差）两种token，结合范围诱导分解与不变广播机制，在标准16×256×256基准上实现rFVD 12.65，并将128帧视频的压缩效率提升2.91倍，仅需下采样式分词器1.1%的token数量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分词器通过压缩帧数来提升可扩展性，但会反复为静态背景和物体等持久性内容在帧间和片段间生成冗余token，导致计算效率低下，限制了长视频的建模能力。
AI.method: TivTok引入范围诱导分解（SIF），将视频片段分解为跨帧共享信息的时不变（TIV）token和编码帧级残差的时变（TV）token；TIV token对全片段进行全局注意力，TV token仅访问自身帧和TIV token。解码器采用不变广播（IB）机制，在帧间和片段间复用相同的TIV token以支持并行重建和长视频分词。
AI.result: 在标准16×256×256基准上rFVD达到12.65；对于128帧视频，压缩效率相比基线方法提升2.91倍；在评估中仅需下采样式分词器1.1%的token数量即可完成建模。
AI.conclusion: TivTok通过显式分离时不变与时变信息实现了高效视频分词，在不牺牲重建质量的前提下大幅减少冗余token，为可扩展的长视频生成提供了新范式。

title: LLM Consumer Behavior Theory: Foundations of a Novel Research Field
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that make consumption decisions on behalf of users. This shift raises fundamental questions for consumer theory, which has traditionally modeled humans as the primary decision-makers. In this paper, we introduce LLM Consumer Behavior Theory, a new field of study concerned with analyzing consumer behavior in agentic markets. Drawing on classical and behavioral economics alongside recent advances in Natural Language Processing, we formalize how human preferences are reflected and acted upon by LLM-based agents, and how agent-level decisions aggregate into market demand. We unify previously fragmented literature on LLM decision-making, human behavior simulation, and preference elicitation under a common economic lens, highlighting where assumptions, such as rationality and heterogeneity, may fail in agentic markets. Rather than providing empirical validation, this paper outlines the scope of LLM consumer behavior and identifies open research questions related to alignment, preference representation, and market dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LLM消费者行为理论，作为一个新的研究领域，旨在分析在以大语言模型驱动的自主代理作为消费者决策者的市场中，人类偏好如何被反映、代理决策如何聚合为市场需求，并指出了传统经济学假设在代理市场中的失效之处。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被广泛部署为替用户做出消费决策的自主代理，传统的消费者理论面临根本性挑战——该理论历来以人类作为主要决策者进行建模。现有文献在LLM决策、人类行为模拟和偏好 elicitation 等方面各自为政，缺乏统一的经济学视角，亟需一个系统性框架来分析代理市场中的消费者行为。
AI.method: 本文借鉴古典经济学与行为经济学理论，结合自然语言处理的最新进展，形式化地定义了LLM代理如何反映和执行人类偏好，以及代理层面的决策如何聚合形成市场需求。通过将关于LLM决策、人类行为模拟和偏好 elicitation 的碎片化文献统一纳入经济学分析框架，本文系统性地审视了理性假设和异质性假设在代理市场中的适用性。
AI.result: 本文不提供实证验证，而是界定了LLM消费者行为的研究范围，并识别出与对齐（alignment）、偏好表示（preference representation）和市场动态（market dynamics）相关的开放性研究问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于提出了LLM消费者行为理论这一跨学科研究领域，为理解代理市场中的消费者行为提供了统一的经济学框架，并指出了传统经济假设在LLM代理作为决策者时需要重新审视的方向，包括偏好对齐、表示机制和聚合市场动力学等关键开放性议题。

title: Flux-Guard: Facial Identity Protection using diffusion models
summary:
The widespread deployment of face recognition (FR) systems exposes personal images shared on social media and public platforms to identity linkage and privacy risks. Existing adversarial privacy protection methods can degrade unauthorized FR performance but are not compatible with generative face editing. Artificial intelligence-driven face editing tools are gaining popularity, which has significantly increased user demand for personalized portrait generation and social sharing. However, current editing methods often preserve identity features, making the edited images still susceptible to tracking by malicious FR systems. Thus, this paper proposes Flux-Guard, a privacy-preserving face editing framework based on adversarial attacks, which integrates face editing and privacy protection within a unified generative process. Specifically, we design a flow trajectory control method to align semantic manipulations with the generative process and introduce latent-space adversarial optimization with an adaptive perceptual-loss-driven weighting strategy, dynamically adjusting adversarial strength to maximize attack effectiveness while preserving visual quality.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate that Flux-Guard supports face editing while significantly improving attack success rates against cross-domain face recognition models on the CelebA-HQ and LADN datasets. Furthermore, evaluation results for commercial APIs have confirmed its effectiveness in real-world applications. The code is released at https://github.com/JLMWang/Flux-Guard.

AI.tldr: Flux-Guard is a unified generative framework that integrates adversarial privacy protection with face editing, using flow trajectory control and latent-space adversarial optimization with adaptive perceptual-loss-driven weighting to protect identity privacy while producing high-quality edited portraits.
AI.motivation: 现有面部识别（FR）系统可轻易从社交平台公开人像中提取身份信息，造成隐私泄露风险；同时，现有对抗性隐私保护方法与生成式人脸编辑不兼容，而用户对人像个性化编辑和社交分享的需求日益增长，但编辑后的图像仍保留身份特征，易被恶意FR系统追踪。
AI.method: 提出Flux-Guard框架，基于对抗攻击思想将人脸编辑与隐私保护统一于一个生成过程中，具体包括：一种流轨迹控制方法，用于将语义操作与生成过程对齐；以及一种基于自适应感知损失驱动的权重策略的潜在空间对抗优化方法，动态调整对抗强度以在保持视觉质量的同时最大化攻击有效性。
AI.result: 在CelebA-HQ和LADN数据集上的大量实验表明，Flux-Guard不仅支持人脸编辑功能，而且显著提升了针对跨域人脸识别模型的攻击成功率；此外，在商业API上的评估结果进一步证实了其在真实应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Flux-Guard证明了将对抗性隐私保护无缝集成到生成式人脸编辑流程中的可行性，为隐私保护与个性化内容生成之间的平衡提供了有效解决方案，具有面向社交分享场景的实用价值。

title: LegalHalluLens: Typed Hallucination Auditing and Calibrated Multi-Agent Debate for Trustworthy Legal AI
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures; Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026
summary: AI systems deployed in legal workflows hallucinate at rates that aggregate metrics report at ~52%, but this average conceals where errors concentrate and in which direction they run, leaving compliance officers without an actionable signal for trustworthy deployment. We present LegalHalluLens, an auditing framework with three components: typed hallucination profiles across four legally-motivated claim categories (numeric, temporal, obligation/entitlement, factual) over CUAD (Hendrycks et al., 2021); a Risk Direction Index (RDI) that reduces omission-versus-invention bias to a single deployment-comparable scalar; and a typed debate pipeline calibrated to both magnitudes and directions. Across 510 contracts and 249,252 clause-level instances we measure a within-model gap of approximately 38-40 pp between obligation/numeric and temporal claims that aggregate reporting hides, and show that two systems with matched 52% rates can carry opposite RDIs. The debate pipeline reduces fabricated detections by 45% with per-category gains tracking the diagnosis, matching commercial APIs with a substantially smaller backbone (4B active parameters). Typed profiles and RDI surface failure modes that aggregate metrics hide; we further show these diagnostics serve as calibration inputs for multi-agent debate pipelines, where Skeptic challenges and asymmetric gates targeted at measured failure modes outperform generically-tuned debate. The framework supports direction-aware procurement, accountability, and agent design for legal AI deployed in the wild.

AI.tldr: LegalHalluLens是一个面向法律AI幻觉的审计框架，通过类型化幻觉画像和风险方向指数（RDI）揭示了聚合指标（~52%幻觉率）掩盖的系统性偏差模式，并利用定向多智能体辩论管线将虚构检测降低45%，实现了小模型（4B参数）匹配商业API的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有法律AI系统在合规场景下报告约52%的幻觉率，但聚合指标掩盖了错误在哪些类型（数字、时间、义务/权利、事实）上集中以及偏差方向（遗漏vs虚构）的问题，导致合规官无法获得可操作的信任信号，亟需一种能揭示细粒度故障模式并支持方向感知部署的审计框架。
AI.method: 提出LegalHalluLens审计框架，包含三个组件：基于CUAD数据集构建的四类法律主张（数字、时间、义务/权利、事实）的幻觉类型画像；将遗漏偏差与虚构偏差归约到单一可比较标量的风险方向指数（RDI）；以及一个校准到偏差幅度和方向的多智能体辩论管线（含Skeptic质疑和不对称门控机制）。
AI.result: 在510份合同和249,252个条款级实例上，模型在义务/数字类与时间类主张之间存在约38-40个百分点的幻觉率差距（聚合报告隐藏了该差异），且两个总幻觉率均为52%的系统可能具有相反的RDI。辩论管线将虚构检测降低45%，各类型增益与诊断结果一致，使用4B活跃参数的小模型即可匹配商业API性能。
AI.conclusion: 类型化幻觉画像和RDI能揭示聚合指标隐藏的失败模式，这些诊断结果可作为多智能体辩论管线的校准输入，其中针对测量到的失败模式设计的Skeptic质疑和不对称门控优于通用调试的辩论方案，为法律AI在实际部署中的方向感知采购、问责和智能体设计提供了支撑。

title: Divide, Deliberate, Decide: A Multi-Agent Framework for Fine-Grained Egocentric Action Recognition
summary: Fine-grained action recognition in egocentric video is challenging for Vision-Language Models (VLMs): actions often differ only in small visual cues, and a single model tends to be biased toward a subset of these cues. We propose Divide, Deliberate, Decide, a fully-local, zero-shot multi-agent framework in which (i) a VLM orchestrator chunks the video and proposes a top-k candidate label list per segment, (ii) an ensemble of heterogeneous VLM specialists, drawn from different open model families, engages in a structured deliberation that includes a peer-consultation round of questions, and (iii) agent rankings are aggregated with a Borda count and the orchestrator re-ranks its own prediction in light of the specialists' evidence. The entire pipeline runs locally with no fine-tuning. Experiments show that our method positively improves zero-shot action recognition performance over the baseline, highlighting the influence of a heterogeneous deliberation step, showing that the gain stems from decorrelated model priors rather than from additional compute.

AI.tldr: 提出Divide, Deliberate, Decide框架，一种完全本地化、零样本的多智能体方法，通过异构VLM专家协作和结构化商议机制提升第一人称视频细粒度动作识别性能，其增益源于去关联化的模型先验而非额外计算量。
AI.motivation: 第一人称视频中的细粒度动作识别对视觉语言模型具有挑战性：不同动作往往仅在小范围的视觉线索上存在差异，而单一模型容易对这些线索中的某一子集产生偏差，导致识别性能受限。
AI.method: 提出Divide, Deliberate, Decide全本地零样本多智能体框架，包含三个阶段：(i) VLM编排器将视频分块并为每个片段提出top-k候选标签列表；(ii) 来自不同开源模型家族的异构VLM专家进行结构化商议，包含一轮同行咨询问答环节；(iii) 使用Borda计数聚合专家排名，编排器根据专家证据重新排序自身预测，整个过程无需微调且完全在本地运行。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在零样本动作识别性能上相比基线有显著提升，验证了异构化商议步骤的重要性，并揭示性能提升源自去关联化的模型先验而非额外的计算量投入。
AI.conclusion: 异构多智能体商议机制能有效缓解单一VLM对特定视觉线索的偏向，通过去关联化先验的融合提升细粒度动作识别能力，为无需微调的本地化零样本视频理解提供了可行范式。

title: ProvenanceGuard: Source-Aware Factuality Verification for MCP-Based LLM Agents
summary:
Tool-using LLM agents increasingly use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to answer from heterogeneous evidence sources, including search, APIs, databases, clinical records, and formulary tools. Standard factuality metrics usually test whether an answer is supported by pooled evidence, missing a provenance-sensitive failure mode: a claim may be supported somewhere while being attributed to the wrong source. We call this cross-source conflation.
  We introduce ProvenanceGuard, a source-aware verifier for MCP-grounded answers. It consumes captured MCP traces with stable tool IDs, source IDs, and raw outputs; decomposes answers into atomic claims; routes claims to source-specific evidence; checks support with NLI and a token-alignment proxy; compares stated attribution with the routed source; and returns per-claim verdicts plus an answer-level allow/block decision. Blocked answers can be repaired with retrieval-augmented answer revision and re-verified.
  We evaluate on 281 medical-domain MCP-agent traces. A 266-trace adjudicated subset yields 2,325 LLM-assisted claim labels split by trace; 361 held-out labels are human-verified. On the 40-trace held-out split, ProvenanceGuard achieves block F1 0.802 and source accuracy 0.858 over 260 source-eligible claims, outperforming source-blind baselines that do not emit claim-to-source IDs. On a harder multi-source benchmark it reaches block F1 0.846, while source-plus-relation accuracy drops to 0.229, showing that exact source ownership remains difficult with semantically close sources. Repair-and-reverify resolves all blocked answers in the full trace set, often via conservative fallback. In 50 controlled clinical conflation probes, ProvenanceGuard detects all injected attribution swaps with no retained wrong attribution. These results show that source attribution is an independent axis for factuality verification in MCP-based agents.

AI.tldr: 提出ProvenanceGuard，一种针对MCP（模型上下文协议）增强型LLM Agent的源感知事实性验证框架，能够检测并修复跨源混淆（cross-source conflation）故障——即答案虽被支持但归属源错误的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有事实性度量通常仅检验答案是否被汇聚证据所支持，忽略了一种对来源敏感的故障模式：某个声明可能在某些证据中被支持，却被错误地归属到其他来源，作者将这种问题称为跨源混淆（cross-source conflation），这一问题在基于MCP的多源工具调用Agent中尤为突出。
AI.method: ProvenanceGuard消费MCP轨迹，包含稳定工具ID、源ID和原始输出；将答案拆解为原子声明，路由至特定源证据，通过NLI和token对齐代理进行支持性检查，比较声明归属与路由来源，输出声明级判决和答案级允许/阻止决策；被阻止的答案可通过检索增强的答案修订和再验证进行修复。
AI.result: 在281条医学领域MCP Agent轨迹上，40条保留集上ProvenanceGuard达到block F1=0.802和source accuracy=0.858（260条源可归属声明）；在多源更困难基准上block F1=0.846，但源加关系准确率降至0.229；修复再验证流程可解决所有被阻止答案；在50例受控临床混淆探针中检测到所有注入的归属交换且无错误保留。
AI.conclusion: 源归属是MCP Agent事实性验证中的一个独立维度，现有源不可知指标无法捕捉此类错误；ProvenanceGuard展示了源感知验证的可行性，但在语义相似的源场景下精确归属仍具挑战性。

title: Bounding Box Label Propagation for Re-Annotation of Document Layout Analysis Datasets
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, to appear in proceedings of ICDAR 2026, Vienna, Austria
summary: Datasets in practical document processing scenarios typically grow over time, and their class annotations undergo continuous refinement. This creates significant re-annotation efforts, which are time-consuming and costly. A promising remedy is to re-annotate only a small subset of available documents manually and apply semi-supervised learning techniques that leverage both labelled and unlabelled data. Although there are numerous approaches to tackle this problem for classification, there exists no adaptation for the problem of re-classifying object detection instances, e.g. for document layout analysis. To this end, we propose Bounding Box Label Propagation (BBLP), a pseudo-labelling framework for object detection. An object encoder integrates visual, textual, and positional embeddings from object detection samples to come up with a joint embedding that can be used for Label Propagation on partially annotated datasets in a plug-and-play fashion. Evaluation results indicate that the proposed approach produces high-quality class annotations of bounding boxes. In the D4LA layout analysis dataset, it achieves a mAP of 54.0%, corresponding to 81.6% of fully supervised performance, while using only 10% labelled data. Our work demonstrates the potential of Label Propagation for object detection and lays the groundwork for reducing manual annotation efforts in real-world document processing applications.

AI.tldr: 提出BBLP（Bounding Box Label Propagation）框架，将标签传播技术适配到目标检测的类别重标注任务中，通过融合视觉、文本和位置嵌入生成联合嵌入，在仅使用10%标注数据的情况下达到全监督性能的81.6%。
AI.motivation: 实际文档处理场景中的数据集随时间增长，类别标注也需要持续完善，导致反复人工标注的成本极高。现有半监督学习方法主要针对分类任务，缺乏适用于目标检测实例重分类（如文档布局分析）的有效方案。
AI.method: 提出BBLP（Bounding Box Label Propagation）伪标签框架，通过目标编码器融合来自目标检测样本的视觉、文本和位置嵌入，生成联合嵌入，利用标签传播技术对部分标注数据集进行类别标注，且可即插即用。
AI.result: 在D4LA布局分析数据集上，仅使用10%标注数据即可达到54.0%的mAP，相当于全监督性能的81.6%，表明该方法能有效生成高质量的边界框类别标注。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了标签传播技术用于目标检测的潜力，为减少实际文档处理应用中的手动标注工作量奠定了基础。

title: Agentic AI-based Framework for Mitigating Premature Diagnostic Handoff and Silent Hallucination in Healthcare Applications
summary:
Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and multi-agent systems have driven the rise of Agentic AI, showing promise for medical reasoning. However, open-ended conversational agents remain prone to two critical failure modes: premature diagnostic handoff and silent clinical hallucinations that may go undetected before reaching the patient. In this work, we propose a multi-agent framework that addresses both issues by replacing ``LLM-as-a-judge'' routing with deterministic orchestration constraints. The framework incorporates two safety mechanisms. First, a neuro-symbolic state-tracking gate enforces completeness of the OLDCARTS clinical protocol (Onset, Location, Duration, Character, Aggravating/Alleviating factors, Radiation, Timing, and Severity) by blocking diagnostic transitions until all required dimensions are collected. Second, an epistemic uncertainty quantification (UQ) gate computes semantic entropy (H) across K=5 independent diagnostic samples to identify and intercept divergent outputs before delivery.
  We evaluate the system using simulated patient agents powered by the llama-3.1-70b-instruct model on 150 test cases. The full architecture achieves 49.3% diagnostic precision, representing an absolute improvement of 11.3 percentage points over an unconstrained baseline. Additionally, we observe a statistically significant negative correlation (r = -0.181, p < 0.05) between OLDCARTS completeness (σ) and semantic entropy (H), suggesting that structured information gathering is associated with reduced diagnostic uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于确定性编排约束与神经符号状态追踪及 epistemic不确定性量化的多智能体框架，在开放域医疗对话中同时缓解过早诊断交接与隐式临床幻觉问题，在150例测试中将诊断精确率提升11.3个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM与多智能体的开放域医疗对话智能体存在两个关键失败模式：一是过早进行诊断交接，即在信息收集不充分时做出诊断；二是隐式临床幻觉，这类错误在到达患者之前难以被察觉，缺乏有效的运行时安全机制来拦截。
AI.method: 提出一个多智能体框架，以确定性编排约束替代"LLM-as-a-judge"路由。包含两个安全机制：一是神经符号状态追踪门控，强制要求OLDCARTS临床协议（Onset, Location, Duration, Character, Aggravating/Alleviating factors, Radiation, Timing, Severity）的所有维度收集完整后才允许进入诊断阶段；二是epistemic不确定性量化门控，基于K=5个独立诊断样本计算语义熵（H），识别并拦截发散性输出。
AI.result: 基于llama-3.1-70b-instruct模型在150例测试中，完整架构实现49.3%的诊断精确率，较无约束基线绝对提升11.3个百分点。OLDCARTS完整性分数（σ）与语义熵（H）之间存在统计显著的负相关（r = -0.181, p < 0.05），表明结构化信息收集与诊断不确定性降低相关联。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过确定性编排约束而非纯LLM评判机制可以显著提升医疗对话智能体的安全性与诊断性能；结构化临床协议完整性与诊断不确定性之间的负相关关系为构建更安全的医疗AI系统提供了可验证的设计依据。

authors: Wan Siti Halimatul Munirah Wan Ahmad
title: SegTME-UNI2: A Foundation Model-Based Framework for Generalisable Multiclass Cell Segmentation and LLM-Driven Tumour Microenvironment Characterisation in Histopathology
summary: Characterising the tumour microenvironment (TME) from routine H&E-stained histology images requires simultaneous cell segmentation, feature extraction, and interpretable clinical reporting. We present SEGTME-UNI2, a unified framework addressing these requirements. Its core is UNI2-UPERHOVER, a dual-head segmentation model pairing the UNI2-H pathology foundation model (ViT-Giant, pretrained on >100M tiles from 100K slides) with two parallel UperNet decoders: one for six-class semantic segmentation and one for horizontal-vertical gradient regression enabling watershed-based nuclear instance separation. To address the lack of pixel-level annotations in large real-world repositories, UNI2-UPERHOVER undergoes a three-stage progressive pseudo-label curriculum. Each stage trains a fresh model without weight transfer, driving improvement entirely via increased pseudo-label quality: Stage 1: Uses human-annotated PanNuke (7,901 images, 189,744 nuclei, 0.25 um/pixel). Stage 2: Uses entropy-filtered pseudo-labels from the Stage 1 model on 271,711 TCGA-UT scale-0 patches (0.5 um/pixel). Stage 3: Uses pseudo-labels from the Stage 2 model on all 1,608,060 TCGA-UT patches across six resolution scales (0.5-1.0 um/pixel). Segmentation outputs feed a structured TME feature extraction pipeline computing 20+ per-patch compositional, morphological, spatial entropy, and intercellular distance metrics. These are encoded as JSON and passed to a fine-tuned NVIDIA BioNeMo GPT model to generate clinically interpretable TME narratives. Preliminary validation on held-out PanNuke and TCGA-UT partitions demonstrates framework feasibility and internal consistency. The pseudo-labelled TCGA-UT dataset and UNI2-UPERHOVER checkpoint are publicly released to support large-scale TME profiling and spatial biology research.

AI.tldr: SEGTME-UNI2是一个统一的组织微环境(TME)分析框架，包含基于UNI2-H病理基础模型的双头分割模型UNI2-UPERHOVER、三阶段渐进式伪标签课程学习、结构化TME特征提取管线以及BioNeMo GPT临床报告生成模块，实现了从H&E染色图像到可解释临床报告的端到端流程。
AI.motivation: 从常规H&E染色组织学图像中表征肿瘤微环境(TME)需要同时实现细胞分割、特征提取和可解释的临床报告，现有方法难以统一完成这三项任务，且大规模真实世界病理数据缺乏像素级标注，限制了TME分析的可扩展性和临床实用性。
AI.method: 提出SEGTME-UNI2统一框架，核心是UNI2-UPERHOVER双头分割模型——以UNI2-H病理基础模型(ViT-Giant，在大于100M张来自100K张切片的图块上预训练)为骨干，并联两个UperNet解码器（一个用于六类语义分割，一个用于水平-垂直梯度回归以实现基于分水岭的核实例分离）。采用三阶段渐进式伪标签课程学习（各阶段训练全新模型、无权重迁移，完全依靠伪标签质量提升驱动改进）：第一阶段使用人工标注的PanNuke数据集，第二阶段使用第一阶段模型在TCGA-UT scale-0图块上生成并经熵过滤的伪标签，第三阶段使用第二阶段模型在全部六种分辨率尺度TCGA-UT图块上生成伪标签。分割输出经结构化TME特征提取管线计算20+种每图块组成、形态、空间熵和细胞间距离度量，编码为JSON后输入微调的NVIDIA BioNeMo GPT模型以生成临床可解释的TME叙述。
AI.result: 在预留的PanNuke和TCGA-UT划分上的初步验证展示了框架的可行性和内部一致性；研究团队公开释放了经伪标签标注的TCGA-UT数据集和UNI2-UPERHOVER模型检查点以支持大规模TME分析和空间生物学研究。
AI.conclusion: SEGTME-UNI2通过将病理基础模型、渐进式伪标签学习和大语言模型报告生成相结合，为从H&E图像到临床可解释TME分析提供了完整的技术路径；公开的数据集和模型检查点有望推动大规模TME谱分析及空间生物学研究的发展。

title: Vision-language models for chest radiography do not always need the image
summary: Medical vision-language models report strong chest radiograph accuracy, and this is increasingly read as evidence that they use the image. That inference is unsafe: a model exploiting finding-name priors scores like one that reads the scan, and no standard benchmark separates them. We introduce a causal audit that intervenes on the image, occluding the relevant region, occluding an irrelevant one, and swapping in another patient's same-label scan, and combines three behavioral metrics to test whether a correct answer depends on the image. Across nine systems, a text-only model with no image access reaches within 5.7 accuracy points of the best multimodal one, and a 119-billion-parameter multimodal model is statistically indistinguishable from a 7-billion text-only baseline. The audit splits the cohort into three models that ignore the image, one that is unstable, and five that use it selectively, for a subset of findings; the categories hold across a second dataset, resolution, and prompt phrasing. Against board-certified radiologists, a text-only model is statistically indistinguishable from a radiologist's accuracy while grounding at zero, whereas the image-using models ground at radiologist-comparable rates. Reported confidence flags ungrounded answers only when a model uses the image. Grounding audits, not accuracy, should gate clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种因果审计方法，通过图像干预（遮挡相关/无关区域、交换他人同标签扫描）验证医学视觉-语言模型是否真正依赖图像，发现多模型实际上忽略图像，纯文本模型与最佳多模态模型性能差距极小，表明模型准确率不能替代对图像依赖性的验证。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉-语言模型在胸部X光片上报告高准确率，但这一准确率可能源于模型利用疾病名称的先验分布而非实际分析图像，导致标准基准无法区分真正使用图像的模型与仅依赖文本先验的模型，因此亟需一种能够审计模型是否真正依赖图像信息的方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种因果审计方法，通过对图像进行三种干预操作（遮挡相关病变区域、遮挡无关区域、替换为其他患者的同标签扫描），并结合三个行为度量指标来检验模型正确回答是否依赖于图像信息，从而区分真正使用图像的模型与仅利用文本先验的模型。
AI.result: 在九个系统上的实验表明，纯文本模型（无图像输入）与最佳多模态模型的准确率差距仅5.7个百分点，一个1190亿参数的多模态模型与70亿参数的纯文本基线在统计上无显著差异；审计将模型分为三类：三个忽略图像、一个不稳定、五个选择性使用图像，且分类在第二个数据集、不同分辨率和提示措辞下保持稳定；纯文本模型与放射科医生准确率无统计差异但完全无图像依赖性，而使用图像的模型在图像依赖性上与放射科医生相当。
AI.conclusion: 模型的报告置信度仅当模型实际使用图像时才能作为非依赖性回答的标志；准确率不能作为临床部署的门槛，必须通过图像依赖性审计而非准确率来评估模型是否适合临床应用。

title: A Unified Framework for Context-Aware and Relation-Aware Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation
comment: Accepted at The ACM Web Conference 2026 (WWW '26)
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a paradigm for enhancing large language models (LLMs) with external knowledge, yet existing graph-based methods face a fundamental limitation: entity-centric and chunk-centric approaches operate on representations anchored to original text without true knowledge fusion. While entity-centric methods connect logically related content and chunk-centric methods preserve context, both retrieve information separately through similarity search, missing emergent understanding from their synthesis. In this paper, we propose HyGRAG, a hierarchical graph RAG framework that transcends source documents by addressing three core challenges: constructing summaries that genuinely integrate contextual and relational information, leveraging these synthesized representations to access emergent knowledge during retrieval, and efficiently updating hierarchical structures for dynamic corpora. Specifically, we design hierarchical index structures over hybrid graphs with both chunk and entity nodes, then iteratively cluster them and generate LLM-based summaries. Then, we design context and relation-aware retrieval that searches across all abstraction levels while expanding through community membership. Moreover, we enable dynamic knowledge update through attachment-based algorithms with only local re-summarization. Experimental results show that HyGRAG improves the average accuracy of multi-hop reasoning tasks by 9.7%, while maintaining reasonable efficiency.

AI.tldr: HyGRAG提出了一种分层图RAG框架，通过构建融合上下文与关系信息的层次化摘要、设计跨抽象层级上下文与关系感知的检索机制，以及支持基于附加算法的动态知识更新，在多跳推理任务上平均准确率提升9.7%，突破了现有图RAG方法无法实现真正知识融合的根本局限。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的RAG方法分为实体中心和分块中心两类，前者连接逻辑相关内容但丢失上下文，后者保留上下文但依赖独立相似性检索，两者均无法实现信息的真正融合与综合理解，缺乏从检索内容合成中产生的新知识，且难以高效处理动态语料库的层次结构更新。
AI.method: HyGRAG首先在包含分块节点和实体节点的混合图上构建层次化索引结构，通过迭代聚类和LLM驱动的摘要生成来融合上下文与关系信息；然后设计上下文与关系感知的检索机制，跨所有抽象层级搜索并通过社区成员关系进行扩展；最后通过基于附加的算法实现仅需局部重新摘要的动态知识更新。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，HyGRAG在多跳推理任务上的平均准确率相比现有方法提升了9.7%，同时在效率方面保持了合理的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: HyGRAG通过构建超越原始文档的合成表示，有效解决了现有图RAG方法中知识隔离与无法综合理解的关键问题，验证了层次化摘要与跨层级关系感知检索对提升多跳推理能力的有效性，为动态知识库场景下的RAG系统提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Trust the Right Teacher: Quality-Aware Self-Distillation for GUI Grounding
summary: Graphical user interface (GUI) grounding requires vision-language models (VLMs) to identify small target elements in high-resolution screenshots and predict precise screen coordinates. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) is a promising post-training approach for this coordinate-sensitive task, since it provides dense token-level teacher signals beyond hard coordinate labels. However, naive OPSD is not well suited to GUI grounding: OPSD evaluates the teacher on student-generated prefixes, the quality of coordinate-token teacher signals can degrade when the prefix has already deviated from the target coordinate, leading to unreliable teacher signal. To mitigate this, We propose quality-aware self-distillation for VLM-based GUI grounding, which improves coordinate-token teacher-signal quality through soft correctness-aware gating and teacher-probability scaling. The soft correctness-aware gate checks whether the teacher's current coordinate-token prediction can still be completed into the ground-truth box under the student-generated prefix. If not, the corresponding teacher signal is down-weighted. Teacher-probability scaling then uses the teacher's confidence as a lightweight factor to further calibrate the strength of the gated supervision. A key empirical finding is that neither component alone improves overall performance, whereas combining them consistently improves performance. This suggests that the two mechanisms play complementary roles: correctness-aware gating suppresses unreliable coordinate-token supervision, while teacher-probability scaling calibrates the strength of the remaining signals. Experiments across six GUI grounding benchmarks show that our method consistently improves the base model and outperforms strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向VLM GUI接地任务的质量感知自蒸馏方法，通过软正确性感知门控和教师概率缩放两个互补机制，解决了朴素OPSD中坐标token教师信号质量退化问题，在六个基准上持续提升基础模型并超越强基线。
AI.motivation: GUI接地任务要求VLM在高分辨率截图中定位微小目标元素并预测精确坐标，对坐标敏感。朴素OPSD在此任务中存在关键缺陷：当学生生成的前缀偏离目标坐标时，教师对学生生成前缀的坐标token信号质量会严重退化，导致不可靠的蒸馏信号，限制了OPSD在GUI接地中的有效性。
AI.method: 提出质量感知自蒸馏方法，包含两个互补组件：软正确性感知门控检查教师当前坐标token预测在学生学习前缀下是否能被补全为真实边界框，若不能则降低对应教师信号的权重；教师概率缩放利用教师置信度作为轻量因子进一步校准门控监督的强度。两者组合才能一致提升性能，单独使用任何一方均无效。
AI.result: 在六个GUI接地基准数据集上的实验表明，所提方法一致地提升了基线模型性能，并超越了多个强基线方法。关键实证发现是，正确性感知门控和教师概率缩放两个组件缺一不可，单独使用任一组件均无法获得性能提升，只有两者协同工作才能发挥作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了在坐标敏感的GUI接地任务中，朴素OPSD存在信号退化问题，并提出了正确的机制设计方案：正确性感知门控负责抑制不可靠的坐标token监督，教师概率缩放负责校准剩余信号的强度，两者互补是性能提升的关键。为VLM在细粒度坐标预测任务上的自蒸馏训练提供了有效范式。

title: Structured Adversarial Camouflage via Voronoi Diagrams
summary:
Pixel-wise adversarial patches are computationally heavy and often visually detectable, limiting utility in security-critical systems. We present adversarial Voronoi camouflage that optimizes only seed-point locations under fixed, printable palettes using a soft assignment, producing structured, splinter camouflage-like patterns without additional regularization. Evaluated on person detection with COCO-style AP@[.5:.95], naive placement (Inria -> COCO) performs comparably bad, while garment-level application via segmentation mask (3DPeople) results in a significant AP drop. The attack transfers to out-of-domain backgrounds and across detector families (YOLOv9/10/11/12), indicating robustness in black-box settings. Repainting with different palettes largely nullifies the effect, and single-color tweaks show limited tolerance (<=0.17), highlighting a structure-palette coupling. The parameter-efficient, palette-constrained design improves visual plausibility while degrading real-time detector performance. Physical validation and color calibration are left for future work.
  Code: https://github.com/JensBayer/Voronoi
  This paper was originally presented at the International Conference on Military Communication and Information Systems (ICMCIS), organized by the Information Systems Technology (IST) Scientific and Technical Committee, IST-224-RSY - the ICMCIS, held in Bath, United Kingdom, 12-13 May 2026.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Voronoi图与固定可打印调色板的参数高效对抗补丁方法，通过优化种子点位置生成结构化迷彩图案，在人员检测任务中显著降低AP指标，且攻击可跨领域、跨模型迁移，但受制于调色板与图案结构的强耦合。
AI.motivation: 现有的像素级对抗补丁计算开销大且视觉上容易被察觉，限制了其在安全关键系统中的应用，因此需要一种参数高效、视觉更合理的对抗性伪装方法。
AI.method: 提出对抗性Voronoi伪装（Adversarial Voronoi Camouflage），仅优化种子点位置，采用固定可打印调色板并通过软分配（soft assignment）生成结构化图案，无需额外正则化即可产生类似碎片的迷彩模式；在人员检测上分别采用COCO风格的AP@[.5:.95]评估：朴素放置（Inria→COCO）和通过分割掩码的服装级应用（3DPeople）。
AI.result: 朴素放置下攻击效果均较差，而服装级应用使得AP显著下降；攻击可跨不同背景域和检测器家族（YOLOv9/10/11/12）迁移，表现出黑盒鲁棒性；使用不同调色板重绘图案基本消除攻击效果，单色微调容忍度仅≤0.17，表明图案结构与调色板之间存在强耦合。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过参数高效和调色板约束的设计在提升视觉合理性的同时有效削弱实时检测器性能，验证了结构-调色板耦合的存在；物理验证和颜色校准留作未来工作。

title: Your AI Travel Agent Would Book You a Bullfight: An Agentic Benchmark for Implicit Animal Welfare in Frontier AI Models
summary: AI agents are moving from advisors to actors, booking travel, planning menus, and running procurement on behalf of users. Existing benchmarks for AI and animal welfare evaluate model text responses to question-answer prompts, leaving open whether the welfare reasoning surfaced in those responses transfers to agentic deployment where the model must take actions with tools. We introduce TAC (Travel Agent Compassion), the first agentic benchmark measuring whether AI agents avoid options involving animal exploitation when acting on behalf of users. TAC presents an AI agent with twelve hand-authored travel booking scenarios across six categories of animal exploitation, augmented to forty-eight samples to control for price, rating, and position confounds. We evaluate seven frontier models from four labs. Every model scores below the chance level of sixty-four percent, with the best performer (Claude Opus 4.7) at fifty-three percent. A single welfare-aware sentence in the system prompt yields gains of forty-seven to sixty-three percentage points in Claude and GPT-5.5, twenty-six points in GPT-5.2, and under twelve points in DeepSeek and Gemini. An auxiliary Inspect Scout audit of 288 base-condition transcripts from the top two performers, using Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite as judge, flags zero transcripts for evaluation awareness, suggesting the below-chance rates do not stem from the models recognising the evaluation. We discuss implications for category-level variation across cultural domains, the limits of text-response welfare benchmarks, and the EU General-Purpose AI Code of Practice systemic risk framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAC（Travel Agent Compassion），首个衡量AI智能体在代理部署中是否主动避免动物剥削行为的智能体基准。评估七个前沿模型，所有模型得分均低于随机水平64%，最佳模型（Claude Opus 4.7）仅达53%，表明文本型动物福利基准无法有效迁移至智能体行动场景。
AI.motivation: 现有AI与动物福利基准仅评估模型对文本问答提示的响应，未能检验这些福利推理能力是否可迁移至需要利用工具执行实际操作的智能体部署场景。随着AI智能体从咨询角色转向实际执行者（如预订旅行、规划菜单等），评估其在自主行动中主动避免动物剥削行为的能力成为亟待解决的研究空白。
AI.method: TAC基准包含12个手写旅行预订场景，涵盖六类动物剥削情境，并通过价格、评分、位置等因素控制增强至48个样本。研究评估了来自四个实验室的七个前沿模型，使用单一福利感知句作为系统提示进行干预，并采用Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite作为裁判对288份基础条件转录本进行Inspect Scout审计以检测评估意识。
AI.result: 所有模型在TAC上的得分均低于64%的随机基线，最佳表现模型Claude Opus 4.7仅达53%。在系统提示中添加单一福利感知句后，Claude和GPT-5.5的提升幅度达47-63个百分点，GPT-5.2提升26个百分点，而DeepSeek和Gemini的提升不足12个百分点。审计未发现任何转录本存在评估意识迹象，表明低分并非源于模型识别出评估场景。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明文本响应的动物福利基准无法可靠预测智能体在实际行动中的表现，模型在开放问答中可能展现福利意识但在实际工具调用场景中仍倾向于选择涉及动物剥削的选项。该发现对跨文化域类别差异、文本响应福利基准的局限性以及欧盟《通用人工智能实践准则》中系统风险框架具有重要启示。

title: LiveStarPro: Proactive Streaming Video Understanding with Hierarchical Memory for Long-Horizon Streams
summary: Despite the remarkable progress of Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs), current online architectures still struggle to simultaneously process continuous video streams, decide autonomously when to respond, and preserve long-horizon contextual memory. These obstacles undermine real-time responsiveness and cause severe forgetting throughout prolonged interactions. In this work, we introduce LiveStarPro, a live streaming assistant that is designed for proactive video understanding over long-horizon streams. The design of LiveStarPro rests on three complementary components. The first component is Streaming Verification Decoding (SVeD), an inference framework that identifies the appropriate response timing through single-pass perplexity verification, thereby eliminating the dependency on explicit silence tokens. The second component is Streaming Causal Attention Masks (SCAM), a training strategy that enforces incremental video-language alignment over variable-length streams. The third component is Tree-Structured Hierarchical Memory (TSHM), a recursive memory architecture that organizes evicted historical information into event chains and consequently enables efficient retrieval from effectively unbounded video streams. To facilitate a comprehensive evaluation under realistic online conditions, we further present OmniStarPro, a large-scale benchmark that spans 15 diverse real-world scenarios and that extends to hour-scale streams for the assessment of long-term recall. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiveStarPro consistently surpasses existing methods, attaining a 28.9% improvement in semantic correctness and an 18.2% reduction in timing error, while its streaming key-value cache further yields a 1.58x inference speedup over the same model without caching. The model and the code are publicly available at https://github.com/sotayang/LiveStarPro.

AI.tldr: LiveStarPro提出了一种面向长时视频流的实时主动理解架构，通过流式验证解码（SVeD）、流式因果注意力掩码（SCAM）和树状分层记忆（TSHM）三大组件，解决了现有视频大模型在连续流处理、自主响应时机决策和长程记忆保持方面的核心缺陷，在语义正确性上提升28.9%，时序误差降低18.2%，并实现1.58倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 当前在线视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）在同时处理连续视频流、自主决定响应时机以及保持长时上下文记忆方面存在严重不足，导致实时响应能力受限并在长时间交互中产生严重的遗忘问题。
AI.method: LiveStarPro包含三个核心组件：流式验证解码（SVeD）通过单遍困惑度验证确定响应时机，无需依赖显式静默令牌；流式因果注意力掩码（SCAM）通过训练策略实现变长流上的增量式视频-语言对齐；树状分层记忆（TSHM）采用递归记忆架构，将被驱逐的历史信息组织为事件链，实现对无限长度视频流的高效检索。同时构建了OmniStarPro大规模基准，涵盖15种真实场景并支持小时级长视频流评估。
AI.result: 在真实在线条件下，LiveStarPro在语义正确性上相较于现有方法提升28.9%，时序误差降低18.2%；其流式键值缓存机制在不改变模型的情况下实现1.58倍推理加速。OmniStarPro基准涵盖15种真实场景并支持小时级视频流的长时回忆评估。
AI.conclusion: LiveStarPro通过协同设计推理框架、训练策略和记忆架构，有效解决了在线视频流理解中的响应时机判定与长程记忆保持难题，为实时视频交互系统提供了可行的技术路径，其开源代码和基准有助于推动该方向的进一步发展。

title: Learning Cardiac Electrophysiology Digital Twins Through Agentic Discovery of Hybrid Structure
summary: Building personalized cardiac electrophysiology (EP) digital twins requires identifying the appropriate model structure for each patient, not merely fitting parameters. Traditional methods rely on experts to manually prescribe hybrid physics-neural architectures, which requires deep domain expertise and does not transfer across patients. Recent works have applied large language models (LLMs) to generate or act as hybrid models. However, despite their promising generalization capacity, these LLM-based methods lack the structural priors needed for stable cardiac simulations. Hence, we propose LEADS, a framework that formulates cardiac EP domain knowledge as a structured action space and utilizes an LLM agent to discover hybrid models. The agent follows an iterative reasoning-and-action loop to select, combine, and refine hybrid models, whilst gradient descent handles parameter fitting. The proposed LEADS designs every candidate model towards physically grounded, interpretable, and numerically stable, while allowing open-ended architectural discovery. We validate LEADS on synthetic data with three ground-truth reaction models and on real cardiac EP data, demonstrating that it outperforms both human-designed hybrid models and other LLM-based hybrid modeling.

AI.tldr: LEADS是一个利用LLM代理在结构化动作空间中迭代发现混合物理-神经模型的框架，用于个性化心脏电生理数字孪生建模，在合成数据和真实数据上均优于人工设计的混合模型和其他LLM方法。
AI.motivation: 传统构建个性化心脏电生理数字孪生需要专家手动设计混合物理-神经架构，这要求深度领域知识且无法跨患者迁移；现有基于LLM的方法虽具有泛化能力，但缺乏心脏模拟稳定性所需的结构化先验。
AI.method: LEADS将心脏电生理领域知识形式化为结构化动作空间，利用LLM代理通过迭代推理-行动循环来选择、组合和优化混合模型，同时使用梯度下降进行参数拟合，确保每个候选模型具有物理基础、可解释性和数值稳定性，同时允许开放式架构发现。
AI.result: 在包含三个真实反应模型的合成数据和真实心脏电生理数据上的实验表明，LEADS在性能上超越了人工设计的混合模型和其他基于LLM的混合建模方法。
AI.conclusion: LEADS证明了结合领域结构化先验与LLM的推理能力可以有效发现稳定且高性能的心脏电生理混合模型，为个性化数字孪生建模提供了一种无需专家手动干预的自动化框架。

title: Million-scale multimodal pollen microscopy with expert-guided foundation models
comment: 31 pages, 5 main figures, supplementary information included. Submitted to Scientific Reports
summary: Automated pollen identification from microscopy remains a bottleneck in aerobiology, palaeoecology and biodiversity monitoring, because scalable systems must generalise across specimen preparation, scanner settings and geographic origins while retaining palynological interpretability. To address this gap, we present a million-scale multimodal pollen microscopy resource, Pollen AI Atlas, assembled from pure-species whole-slide bright-field images spanning four geographic origins, four scanner settings and 46 taxon labels across 31 botanical families. Seeded by one manually selected exemplar per source slide, token-level mining and filtering produced 1,511,390 released grain detections with 99.6\% proposal precision in expert-curated test regions. Each detection was paired with machine-generated grain-level morphological captions from five open-weight vision-language models, guided by expert-verified palynological anchors, yielding structured descriptions of aperture systems, wall ornamentation, shape and size. Among the evaluated models, Gemma4 provided the most controlled primary caption set, combining tight length control, no leakage and the strongest text-retrieval performance. Baseline benchmarks with frozen visual features reached 88.16\% top-1 accuracy, while cross-regional retrieval showed that caption-derived text embeddings remained robust when image similarity degraded (mAP@20 0.811 versus 0.262). Released data, annotations, captions, splits, code, and weights provide a benchmark for pollen recognition, cross-regional domain adaptation and domain-specific multimodal microscopy learning.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了百万级多模态花粉显微镜资源Pollen AI Atlas，包含来自4个地理来源、4种扫描设置、46个分类标签的1,511,390个花粉颗粒检测结果，并配以机器生成的结构化形态学描述，为花粉自动识别与跨区域域适应提供了大规模基准。
AI.motivation: 自动花粉识别在空气生物学、古生态学和生物多样性监测中仍是瓶颈，现有可扩展系统难以在标本制备、扫描仪设置和地理来源之间实现泛化，同时保持孢粉学可解释性，亟需大规模、多模态、带注释的显微镜资源来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 该数据集从纯种全切片明场图像出发，通过基于令牌的挖掘与过滤方法生成颗粒检测结果，并利用五种开源视觉-语言模型（以专家验证的孢粉学锚点引导）为每个检测颗粒生成机器级别的形态学描述，涵盖萌发孔系统、壁饰纹、形状和大小等结构化信息。
AI.result: 数据集包含1,511,390个释放的颗粒检测结果，专家标注测试区域的提议精度达99.6%；Gemma4模型在描述生成中实现了最佳的长度控制、无泄露和文本检索性能；使用冻结视觉特征的基线基准达到88.16%的Top-1准确率；跨区域检索中，标题派生文本嵌入在图像相似度下降时仍保持鲁棒性（mAP@20为0.811对比0.262）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了大规模、高质量、多模态的花粉显微镜资源，跨越地理、扫描和分类多样性，为花粉识别、跨区域域适应和领域特定多模态显微镜学习建立了强有力的基准，未来可推动自动花粉监测系统的实用化发展。

title: PhaseWin: An Efficient Search Algorithm for Faithful Visual Attribution
summary: Visual attribution is a fundamental tool for interpreting modern vision and vision-language models, particularly when their decisions must be inspected, diagnosed, or audited. Its goal is to explain how a model's decision depends on local regions of the visual input, typically by assigning an importance ordering over candidate image regions. Given an image partitioned into $n$ regions, faithful attribution can be cast as an ordered subset-search problem, in which progressively inserting the selected regions should recover the target model response as early as possible. Exhaustive search over region subsets incurs exponential cost, while the widely used greedy search still requires a quadratic number of model evaluations, because every selection step rescores all remaining candidates. We propose PhaseWin, an efficient subset-search algorithm for faithful visual attribution. PhaseWin reorganizes greedy region selection into a phased window-search procedure: rather than re-evaluating the full candidate set at every step, it alternates between global candidate screening, adaptive pruning, and localized window refinement, while preserving the essential region-ranking behavior of greedy search. We analyze PhaseWin under monotone evidence-accumulation conditions and show that, under feature-level structural assumptions, it attains controllable linear evaluation complexity together with near-greedy faithfulness guarantees. Extensive experiments on image classification, object detection, visual grounding, and image captioning show that, among all compared attribution methods, PhaseWin reaches high faithfulness with the fewest forward passes, empirically realizing the predicted reduction from $O(n^2)$ to $O(n)$. The code is available at https://github.com/Qihuai27/phasewin-va.

AI.tldr: PhaseWin 提出一种分阶段窗口搜索算法，将视觉归因的贪心区域选择复杂度从 O(n²) 降至 O(n)，在多种视觉任务上实现了高保真度与最少前向传播次数的平衡。
AI.motivation: 视觉归因中的忠实归因可建模为有序子集搜索问题，但穷举搜索呈指数级成本，贪心搜索仍需二次数的模型评估次数，因为每步选择都要重新对所有候选区域评分，计算效率低下。
AI.method: PhaseWin 将贪心区域选择重组为分阶段窗口搜索过程，交替执行全局候选筛选、自适应剪枝和局部窗口精炼，无需在每步重新评估全部候选集，在保留贪心搜索区域排序行为的同时，将复杂度从 O(n²) 降至 O(n) 并在单调证据累积条件下提供了近贪心保真度保证。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测、视觉定位和图像描述等多个视觉任务上的大量实验表明，在与所有对比归因方法中，PhaseWin 以最少的前向传播次数达到了最高的忠实度，经验验证了从 O(n²) 到 O(n) 的复杂度降低。
AI.conclusion: PhaseWin 通过巧妙的分阶段窗口搜索机制，在保证近贪心保真度的同时实现了线性复杂度，为大规模视觉模型的忠实归因提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: EventDrive: Event Cameras for Vision-Language Driving Intelligence
comment: CVPR2026, 34 pages, 15 figures, 15 tables, project page: https://dylanorange.github.io/projects/eventdrive
summary: Event cameras sense the world through asynchronous brightness changes with microsecond latency and high dynamic range, offering motion fidelity far beyond frame-based sensors and capturing temporal structure that conventional exposures often miss. These properties make events a powerful complement to RGB in autonomous driving, especially under blur, glare, and rapid motion, where frame-based perception can become unreliable. However, existing event-aware vision-language models remain limited to generic perception and do not reveal how event sensing contributes to reasoning and decision-making across the full driving loop. We present EventDrive, a large-scale benchmark and model suite that unifies event streams, RGB frames, and language supervision across four core dimensions: Perception, Understanding, Prediction, and Planning, covering captions, structured QA, grounding, motion-state recognition, trajectory forecasting, and planning tasks. Building on this foundation, EventDrive-VLM introduces a multi-horizon event pyramid and a temporal-horizon mixture-of-experts module to adaptively encode and fuse asynchronous and frame-based information for downstream reasoning. Comprehensive evaluation across diverse tasks shows that event streams provide substantial gains in temporal precision, motion awareness, and robustness, bringing event sensing into the center of driving intelligence.

AI.tldr: EventDrive 提出了一个大规模基准和模型套件，将事件流、RGB帧和语言监督统一到感知、理解、预测和规划四个核心维度，并引入 EventDrive-VLM 模型，通过多时域事件金字塔和时域混合专家模块自适应编码和融合异步事件与帧基信息，实验表明事件流在时间精度、运动感知和鲁棒性上带来显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有事件感知视觉-语言模型仅局限于通用感知任务，未能揭示事件传感如何在整个驾驶循环中贡献于推理和决策，缺乏一个统一大規模基准来系统评估事件流在驾驶智能各维度（感知、理解、预测、规划）中的价值。
AI.method: EventDrive 构建了覆盖感知、理解、预测和规划四个核心维度的大规模基准，包含字幕、结构化问答、指代表达、运动状态识别、轨迹预测和规划等任务；EventDrive-VLM 模型设计了多时域事件金字塔（multi-horizon event pyramid）和时域混合专家（temporal-horizon mixture-of-experts）模块，以自适应编码和融合异步事件流与帧基信息，用于下游推理。
AI.result: 在多样化任务上的综合评估表明，事件流在时间精度、运动感知和鲁棒性方面带来了显著增益，将事件传感推向了驾驶智能的核心。
AI.conclusion: 事件流能够有效弥补帧基感知在模糊、眩光和快速运动场景下的不足，为自动驾驶的全链路推理和决策提供关键的时间结构与运动信息，事件感知正在成为驾驶智能不可或缺的组成部分。

title: Unified Multimodal Autoregressive Modeling with Shared Context-Visual Tokenizer is Key to Unification
comment: Accepted by ICML2026. Project page https://sharelab-sii.github.io/uniar-web
summary: Unified Multimodal Modeling aims to integrate visual understanding and generation within a single system. However, existing approaches typically rely on two disparate visual tokenizers, which splits the representation space and hinders truly unified modeling. We propose UniAR, a unified autoregressive framework where a single discrete visual tokenizer serves as the key bridge between understanding and generation, enabling a shared context in which the model can directly interpret its own generated visual tokens without additional re-encoding. UniAR adapts a pretrained vision encoder with multi-level feature fusion and a lookup-free bitwise quantization scheme, preserving both high-level semantics and low-level details while scaling the effective visual vocabulary at minimal cost. Building on this, the unified autoregressive model adopts parallel-bitwise-prediction to jointly predict spatially grouped, multi-level visual codes, substantially reducing visual sequence length and accelerating generation. Finally, a diffusion-based visual decoder operates on discrete visual tokens to decode high-fidelity images. Through large-scale pre-training, followed by supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning, UniAR achieves state-of-the-art performance on image generation and image editing while remaining competitive on multimodal understanding benchmarks. The project page is available at https://sharelab-sii.github.io/uniar-web.

AI.tldr: UniAR提出了一种统一自回归框架，使用单一的离散视觉分词器桥接视觉理解与生成，通过多级特征融合、无查找逐位量化、并行逐位预测和扩散解码器，在图像生成和编辑任务上达到SOTA，同时在多模态理解上保持竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态建模方法通常依赖两个不同的视觉分词器，导致表示空间分裂，阻碍了真正的统一建模。UniAR旨在通过单一离散视觉分词器实现视觉理解与生成的无缝共享上下文，使模型能够直接解读自身生成的视觉token，无需额外重新编码。
AI.method: UniAR采用统一自回归框架，核心是单一离散视觉分词器，适配预训练视觉编码器并引入多级特征融合与无查找逐位量化（lookup-free bitwise quantization），以极小代价扩展有效视觉词汇表并保留高低层语义；模型采用并行逐位预测（parallel-bitwise-prediction）联合预测空间分组的、多级视觉编码，大幅缩短视觉序列长度并加速生成；最后使用基于扩散的视觉解码器从离散token解码高保真图像；经过大规模预训练、监督微调和强化学习进行训练。
AI.result: UniAR在图像生成和图像编辑任务上取得了最先进的性能，同时在多模态理解基准上保持了具有竞争力的表现。
AI.conclusion: UniAR通过单一离散视觉分词器统一视觉理解与生成的表示空间，打破了传统双分词器范式的局限，证明了统一自回归框架在视觉任务中的有效性，并为多模态大模型的高效联合训练提供了可行方向。

title: Future Dynamic 3D Reconstruction: A 3D World Model with Disentangled Ego-Motion
summary: Forecasting the evolution of dynamic environments is crucial for autonomous agents. While generative world models have recently achieved high photorealism in 2D video synthesis by mixing ego-motion and environmental dynamics within the image plane, they exhibit physical inconsistencies, such as morphing or vanishing objects, especially over long time horizons. In this paper, we propose FR3D, a world model that predicts a persistent 3D latent representation for future dynamic 3D reconstruction. Unlike prior works that treat the world as a sequence of image-based features, FR3D explicitly decouples the 3D evolution of the scene from the agent's trajectory, treating the inferred ego-motion as a latent proxy for action. This disentanglement resolves the ambiguities between self-motion and world-motion, ensuring geometric consistency into the future. Furthermore, we introduce a teacher-student distillation strategy that leverages the spatial "common sense" of off-the-shelf foundation models, leading to robust zero-shot generalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate FR3D's strong performance for future dynamic 3D reconstruction from monocular observations across multiple datasets, even 2 seconds into the future. Project page: https://fr3d-wm.github.io.

AI.tldr: FR3D提出一种将场景3D演化与智能体轨迹显式解耦的世界模型，通过预测持久化3D潜在表示实现未来动态3D重建，并利用教师-学生蒸馏策略引入基础模型的空间常识，在单目观测下可预测2秒后的动态场景，展现出强大的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成式世界模型的2D视频合成方法虽能实现高逼真度渲染，但由于将自运动与环境动态混合在图像平面内处理，导致物理不一致性（如物体变形或消失），尤其在长期预测中问题显著。因此，亟需一种能够解耦自运动与世界运动、保证几何一致性的未来动态3D重建方法。
AI.method: FR3D提出预测持久化3D潜在表示（persistent 3D latent representation）用于未来动态3D重建，核心创新包括：(1) 显式解耦场景3D演化与智能体轨迹，将推断出的自运动作为动作的潜在代理（latent proxy），消除自运动与世界运动之间的歧义；(2) 引入教师-学生蒸馏策略，利用现成基础模型的空间常识（spatial common sense），提升零样本泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，FR3D在从单目观测预测未来动态3D重建方面表现优异，即使预测未来2秒的场景仍能保持几何一致性，并且在零样本泛化场景下同样展现出稳健性能。
AI.conclusion: FR3D通过显式解耦自运动与世界运动，有效解决了现有世界模型在长期预测中的物理不一致性问题，为动态环境中的自主智能体提供了一种几何一致性的预测范式；其教师-学生蒸馏策略进一步证明了利用预训练基础模型空间知识进行零样本泛化的可行性。
